Second stack: Deal damage equal to 146.2% of ATK plus 8.

Hold normal attack in mid-air to trigger Falling Shadow.
Plummet from the skies, dealing damage equal to 160% of ATK plus 8 and knocking the target down.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of enemies within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging for 0.5 seconds.

Unleash Leafy Green at the target while performing a backflip, dealing damage equal to 70% of ATK plus 4, generating 1–3 epiphyllums upon hit, and forming a Green Field that lasts for 5 seconds. When enemies in the Green Field lock onto the Wanderer, their movement speed is reduced by 50%.
Passive: Can be unleashed on the ground or mid-air.
Passive: Immediately break the control if under control effect and automatically release Leafy Green without using any dodge attempts. Skill cooldown lasts for 20 seconds.

Create a Moonlight Realm around yourself for 15 seconds. Your damage dealt in the realm is increased by 10%, jumping ability increased by 20%, and endurance consumption reduced by 50%. Cooldown: 30 seconds.

Enter the special state Airbloom when using Shadoweave in the realm. Your fall speed is greatly reduced and you can perform multiple double-jumps. In this state, using the directional controls and jump button while mid-air will perform a Roam and launch an attack on the target. Upon hit, deal damage equal to 66% of ATK plus 3 and randomly generate 1–3 epiphyllums.
Passive: In the Moonlight Realm, 1 epiphyllum will be generated near 1 target every 0.8 seconds.
Passive: When you use Shadoweave in Moonlight Realm, an extra 50% of damage is dealt to enemies with less than 20% HP.
Passive: When you use Shadoweave in Moonlight Realm, incoming damage will be detected and you will blink away from the target's location. Cooldown: 10 seconds.
Passive: Weapons Master

Flame: When Shadoweave is paired with 2 flame weapons, Moonlight Realm is converted to Flame: Moonlight Realm, which lasts for an extra 4 seconds when burning targets. Targets with the shield take an extra 15% flame damage.

Volt: When Shadoweave is paired with 2 volt weapons, Moonlight Realm is converted to Volt: Moonlight Realm, with a 65% chance of not consuming a dodge attempt when dodging, and a 35% boost to dodge attack damage. When Volt Resonance is activated, volt damage is boosted an extra 30%.

Frost: When Shadoweave is paired with 2 frost weapons, Moonlight Realm is converted to Frost: Moonlight Realm. The targets in the realm will be inflicted with Frostbite for 15 seconds after taking frost damage 10 times, and receive an extra 22% damage from frost attacks during this period. The number of attacks does not stack when a target is already Frostbitten.

Physical: When Shadoweave is paired with 2 physical weapons, Moonlight Realm is converted to Physical: Moonlight Realm. When you have an HP Shield, deal damage equal to 150% of ATK plus 8 to targets within range every second.

Balance: When Shadoweave is paired with any two different elemental weapons (among flame, volt, frost, and physical weapons), the Wanderer's ATK is increased by 15% in the realm, and counted as activating flame, volt, frost, and physical resonance without resonance effects.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and unleash Gravity Weave with a stronger absorption force, dealing damage equal to 542% of ATK plus 29. Then explode and create a ranged diffusion wave after 5 seconds, dealing damage equal to 271% + 14. When the skill is active, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Lyra
weapon_description: A support weapon custom-made for an insider of the Maidelin Foundation. Ms. Maidelin believes that Lyra could make proper use of it.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will cause enemies to become grievous for 7 seconds, increasing their damage received by 20% and dealing damage equal to {1}% of ATK. When in team play, physical damage dealt to grievous targets is increased by an additional 20%.

Physical Resonance: Increase physical ATK by 15% and physical resistance by 25%. Activate by equipping 2 or more physical weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Physical Resonance or Physical Reaction effects, and Physical Resonance takes effect first.
Physical Benediction: Increase physical ATK by 5% when Benediction Resonance is activated.

Releasing any weapon skill or discharge refreshes Guard duration if Guards are at maximum, dealing physical damage equal to 120% of physical ATK × number of Guards to the enemy. Up to 8 Guards with Benediction, and up to 6 without it.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.

Increase all damage dealt by Guards by 20%, and increase the guarded target's final damage by 15% for 10 seconds when releasing any weapon skill or discharge under the effect of Benediction Resonance.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

Forgiveness Guard: After releasing Resonance 5 times, receive 1 chance to negate lethal damage for the wielder and the guarded target. After a teammate negates lethal damage, they will consume Forgiveness Guard and recover 5% of Max HP. Unavailable in Apex League.

Enlightenment Guard: After releasing Resonance 5 times and when having Enlightenment Guard, the wielder receives 2 chances to negate lethal damage. Stack up to 5 times. After the wielder negates lethal damage, they will consume 1 stack of Enlightenment Guard and recover 5% of Max HP. Unavailable in Apex League.

When unleashing any weapon skill or discharge, the increase of final damage and healing depends on the number of Guards. Each Guard increases final damage and healing by 1.6%, up to 8% for 25 seconds.

Enlightenment: Normal attack (without Benediction Resonance) deals additional damage to targets marked with Enlightenment. The damage equals the number of Guards you carry × 7.68% of ATK (up to 46.08% of ATK). This damage is treated as discharge skill and weapon skill damage, and will not trigger additional attack effects.

With Benediction Resonance, Normal attack deals additional damage to targets marked with Enlightenment. The damage equal to the number of Guards you and your teammates carry × 5.52% of ATK (up to 44.16% of ATK). This damage is also treated as discharge skill and weapon skill damage, and will not trigger additional attack effects.
Glowing: Normal attack restores HP equal to 15% of ATK upon hit.
Sacred Strike: Attack in air and Accumulator can convert 60% of charge ability to Shatter.

Guard: For every 15% HP lost or 300 weapon charge gained, gain up to 5 Enlightenment Guards (applies for the off-hand slot). These Guards last 25 seconds. If your Enlightenment Guards are full, new ones will attack enemies, dealing physical damage equal to 120% of ATK, then disappear. This damage does not trigger additional attack effects.
Note: In Bygone Phantasm, Vesper is not considered a support weapon.
While on the ground, use Vesper to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 139.8% of ATK plus 7 and knock the target back a short distance.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 101.3% of ATK plus 5 and knock the target back significantly.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 212.5% of ATK plus 11 and knock the target back a short distance.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 296.5% of ATK plus 16 and suspend the target.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 336.7% of ATK plus 18 and launch the target.

While airborne, tap normal attack to unleash Frustration. Each punch deals damage equal to 56.9% of ATK plus 3 and consumes 10 endurance. The last hit deals damage equal to 213.4% of ATK plus 11 and launches the target.
When unleashing Frustration, grab the target if possible and throw it to the ground, dealing damage equal to 954.1% of ATK plus 50 in total.

Tap and hold normal attack for up to 3 charges. Strongly suspend the target upon hit, and become immune from damage and control effects during an Accumulator attack. Releasing before getting hit can trigger Phantasia.
Phase 1 charged hit: Deal damage equal to 164.5% of ATK plus 9.
Phase 2 charged hit: Deal damage equal to 382.3% of ATK plus 20.
Phase 3 charged hit: Deal damage equal to 618% of ATK plus 33.
Tap and hold normal attack during normal attacks or after dodging to unleash Shimmer. Each punch deals damage equal to 34.2% of ATK plus 2 and consumes 10 endurance. Release to trigger Accumulator.
While airborne, tap and hold normal attack to trigger 3 mid-air charges. Release to pummel the ground and strongly suspend targets. Releasing before getting hit can trigger Phantasia.
Phase 1 charged attack: Deal damage equal to 285% of ATK plus 15.
Phase 2 charged attack: Deal damage equal to 494% of ATK plus 26.
Phase 3 charged attack: Deal damage equal to 779% of ATK plus 41.

After dodging, tap normal attack to pull the target to you and draw it in for 2 seconds, dealing damage equal to 313.7% of ATK plus 17. Tapping and holding normal attack after dodging can trigger Shimmer after unleashing Mind Capture.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, which reduces the speed of enemies within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging for 0.5 seconds and recover 250 endurance.
Forgiveness Guard: Excess healing converts into an HP shield, up to 60% Max HP. Vesper triggers different effects based on Weapon Resonance when Forgiveness Guard is active.

Benediction Guard: Replaces skill with Shinerise. Removes Enlightenment Guard from the Wanderer but grants Forgiveness Guard to allies. For every 15% Max HP healed, gains one Forgiveness Guard. Each ally can hold one Forgiveness Guard. If all allies already have a Forgiveness Guard, it deals 144% physical damage to an enemy but does not trigger any damage bonus effects. Increases the entire team’s Max HP by 12.5% (Unstakable).
Attack Guard: When Vesper’s skill hits, gains a Shield equal to 30% Max HP. (30s cooldown)
Fortitude Guard: When Vesper’s skill hits, restores 2% Max HP per second for 20s. (30s cooldown)
Balance Guard: Above 50% HP: Increases Shatter by 220%; Below 50% HP: Increases Final Damage by 10% and Shatter by 10%.
Leap toward the target, dealing damage equal to 968.4% of ATK plus 51 and strongly suspending it. Inflict an Enlightenment mark on the target for 18 seconds. Cooldown: 20 seconds.

Pummel the ground and strongly launch targets in front, dealing damage equal to 968.4% of ATK plus 51 and summoning up to 3 Blades for 75 seconds (up to 1 Blade every 2 meters). This skill can be used up to 3 times, with a cooldown of 20 seconds each time. When 2 Blades exist on the field, a Clearshine is created. When a Blade is touched, it heals targets within the movement radius, restoring HP equal to 25% of the target's ATK. When 3 Blades exist, a Nebula is created. When a Blade is touched, it damages targets within the movement radius, dealing damage equal to 300% of ATK × movement distance / 5m.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, switching to this weapon from another removes all debuffs from the wielder and unleashes Chanting Sigh, dealing damage equal to 997.6% of ATK plus 53 and adding an Enlightenment mark to the target for 18 seconds, during which damage immunity lasts 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Tian Lang
weapon_description: This long spear covered in lightning is the SMA1-TS00-Thunderbreaker. It is able to unleash the stored power through unimaginable means. The electric field that it generates disrupts the mind of its wielder, so it cannot be mastered by ordinary people.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will strongly paralyze targets for 1 second and electrify them for 6 seconds, removing all their buffs and dealing damage equal to {1}% of ATK. Electrified targets can't receive any buffs for the next 6 seconds.

Volt Reaction: Increase volt ATK by 20% and volt resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more volt weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Volt Resonance or Volt Reaction effects, with Volt Resonance taking precedence.

Gain 1 stack of Superconductor per charge: Increase Max HP by 7.5% but increase damage received by 2% (except when the current HP is lower than 50 times of volt ATK and no HP Shield is equipped), stacking up to 8 times. Lose 1 stack if no Superconductor gets refreshed within 6 seconds.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
Release any volt weapon skill or discharge skill to get 2 charges. Gain hyperbody at 8 Superconductor stacks.
Increase the current weapon's base HP growth by 32%.
Each Superconductor stack increases final damage by 1%.
Boost Dubhe's Volt Sense: For every 1 other volt weapon sensed, gain 10% volt damage boost for 25 seconds.

When wielding Thunderbreaker, every 4 normal attacks will charge the weapon, stacking up to 5 charges. After charging, any Electromancy dodge skill triggers electrocution with lightning. Lightning damage dealt equals 5% of HP lost (but no lower than 100% of Volt ATK, and no higher than 1,000% of Volt ATK) , and triggers Electrified Entity, which deals area volt damage equal to 2% of HP lost (no lower than 40% of Volt ATK, and no higher than 400% of Volt ATK).
While on the ground, initiate 6 attacks in a row with Thunderbreaker.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 90.5% of ATK plus 5 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 67.9% of ATK plus 4 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 123% of ATK plus 6 and knock the target back.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 217.9% of ATK plus 11 and knock the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 222% of ATK plus 12 and knock the target back.
Sixth Attack: Deal damage equal to 291.8% of ATK plus 15 and launch the target.
While airborne or after jumping once, use normal attack to attack 5 times in a row in mid-air.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 87.4% of ATK plus 5.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 83% of ATK plus 4.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 126.7% of ATK plus 7.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 229.4% of ATK plus 12.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 256.5% of ATK plus 14.
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack to trigger.
Deal damage up to 342% of ATK plus 18 to the target and gather enemies around you.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne, or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetpack to trigger.
While falling, deal damage equal to 38% of ATK plus 2 each hit. Upon landing, deal damage equal to 285% of ATK plus 15 to nearby targets.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of enemies within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging for 0.5 seconds.
Tap normal attack during the short period after dodging.
Dash to attack the target, dealing total damage equal to 172.6% of ATK plus 9.

Unleash a barrage of attacks, dealing damage equal to 936.9% of ATK plus 49 to enemies in range, and transforms enemies and your summons within a certain range into Electrified Entities, which allow up to 3 Electrified Entities exist at a time. Cooldown: 30 seconds.
Gain Volt Sense when Dubhe is used: Scan the other two equipped weapons when unleashing skills. Each time a volt weapon is sensed, volt ATK increases by 6% for 25 seconds.

Electrified Entity: When unleashing any volt weapon skill or discharge, Electrified Entities unleash volt area damage equal to 5% of missing HP (no less than 100% volt ATK, no more than 1,000% volt ATK).

When using Thunderbreaker, unleashing any volt weapon skill or discharge skill consumes 30% of current HP to deal additional volt damage equal to 50% of the consumed HP (no less than 480% volt ATK, no more than 3,000% volt ATK) and gain temporary invincibility (unavailable in Apex League). 8 seconds later or when HP is lower than 10%, recover 5% missing HP every second for 8 seconds (not affected by healing effects). The recovery effect cannot be stacked.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer. Thunderbreaker unleashes wide-range volt damage, dealing total damage equal to 844.6% of ATK plus 44 and transforms enemies or your summons within a certain range into Electrified Entities. Up to 3 Electrified Entities can exist at a time.

Electrified Entity: When unleashing any volt weapon discharge skill, Electrified Entities unleash volt area damage equal to 5% of missing HP (no less than 100% volt ATK, no more than 1,000% volt ATK).

When using Thunderbreaker, unleashing any volt weapon skill or discharge consumes 30% of current HP to deal additional volt damage equal to 50% of the consumed HP (no less than 480% of volt ATK and no more than 3,000% of volt ATK) and gain temporary invincibility (unavailable in Apex League). After 8 seconds or when HP is lower than 10%, recover 5% missing HP every second for 8 seconds (not affected by healing effects). The recovery effect cannot be stacked.

name: Annabella
weapon_description: A VR multiplayer shooting game that is incredibly popular in Mirroria specially designed this exclusive gun for their top player from a certain season. The customized physical model of the gun was also sent to the player, but nobody realized it could be used just like in the game...

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will ignite the target for 8 seconds, dealing damage equal to {3}% of ATK every second. While ignited, targets' healing effect is reduced by 50%.

Flame Reaction: Increase flame ATK by 20% and flame resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more flame weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Flame Resonance or Flame Reaction effects, with Flame Resonance taking precedence.

Tranquil Heart: Using discharge/skills/charged attacks/dodging with Clover Cross increases Clover Cross's final crit rate by 5% for 15 seconds, stacking up to 3 times. After crit rate exceeds 100%, 50% of the extra amount will be converted into up to 7.5% of crit damage.

Hitting a target 2 times with Cross Snipe creates an Optical Space for 12 seconds at the target location. After an enemy in the Optical Space triggers burn tally, burn tally will be triggered an additional 2 times. When an enemy leaves the Optical Space, their speed is reduced by 80% for 2.5 seconds. Cooldown: 12 seconds.
Targets of Cross Snipe will be terrified (speed is slowed by 80%) for 1.5 seconds. Cooldown: 4 seconds.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
After Cross Snipe lands a critical hit, recover HP equal to 50% of the damage dealt (not exceeding 15% of own Max HP) and 50 weapon charge.
Each stack of Tranquil Heart increases final crit rate to 9%, up to 27%, and converts up to 13.5% of crit damage.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
Ruthless Bomb Enhancement: While in the Burn Enhancement state, burn damage dealt to targets is increased to 30%.
Deceitful Bomb Enhancement: Gas explosion damage ignores 30% of the target's flame resistance.
Increase damage dealt by Cross Snipe by an additional 20%.
While on the ground, attack 3 times in a row with the sniper rifle.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 50.8% of ATK plus 3 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 97.1% of ATK plus 5 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 203.4% of ATK plus 11 and launch the target.

Tap and hold normal attack to charge an attack, dealing base damage equal to 66.7% of ATK plus 4. After charging, deal damage up to 460.9% of ATK plus 24. Deal double damage for a headshot or when hitting an enemy's weak point, and launch the target (headshots are ineffective against Wanderers).
Passive: Recover 300 weapon charge when Cross Snipe hits a burning target or lands a critical hit. Cooldown: 15 seconds.
Passive: Speed is increased by 30% for 3 seconds after using Cross Snipe.

After any normal attack, tap and hold normal attack to fire a laser projectile that explodes upon hitting the target, dealing damage up to 172.5% of ATK plus 9 to the target within range and suspending them.
While airborne, use normal attack to attack 3 times in a row in mid-air.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 54.8% of ATK plus 3 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 104.5% of ATK plus 6 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 219% of ATK plus 12 and launch the target.
Leap backward and throw 1 grenade forward, which detonates upon hitting the ground, dealing damage up to 42.6% of ATK plus 2 to targets and suspending them in the air.
Passive: After using Twilight Arc, use normal attack to instantly fire a fully charged Cross Snipe.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, which reduces the speed of enemies within the area. Cooldown: 15 seconds. Become immune to hitstun while dodging for 0.5 seconds.
Switch modules to change the effects of Cross Snipe and Twilight Arc. Cross Snipe can be used up to 8 times. Skill cooldown: 14 seconds.

Ruthless Bomb: The effect of Cross Snipe becomes a flame explosion that deals base damage equal to 68% of ATK plus 4 within an area. After charging, deal damage up to 471.5% of ATK plus 25. Upon hitting targets that are not burning, inflict them with Cross Burn, which deals damage equal to 120% of ATK every second for 13 seconds. Upon hitting burning targets, inflict them with Cross Burn, and enter Burn Enhancement for 20 seconds, which increases burn damage on targets by 20%. When using Twilight Arc, you now throw 3 grenades instead.

Deceitful Bomb: Changes the effects of Cross Snipe into a ranged Gas attack that deals base damage equal to 93% of ATK plus 5 upon hit. After charging, deal up to 644.5% of ATK plus 34. Targets in the Gas will be slowed. The slow effect becomes stronger over time, and the Gas lasts 7 seconds. Twilight Arc can detonate the Gas (the longer the charge, the greater the Gas explosion damage), dealing explosion damage up to 713% of ATK plus 38 (this is deemed as triggering Cross Snipe 1 time) and reducing the target's flame resistance by 10% for 10 seconds.

Passive: After confirming the module, you will get a number of Optical Enhancement uses corresponding to the number of dodge attempts. Optical Enhancement: Reduces the charging time of Cross Snipe by 30%, becoming immune to control effects while charging. Recover 1 dodge attempt (up to 4 dodge attempts) every 2 dodges.
Passive: While the Deceitful Bomb Module is in effect, Cross Snipe has a chance of reducing the cooldown of other flame weapon skills by 0.7 seconds after hitting a target.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and throw an incendiary bomb that can be detonated by firing at it, dealing damage up to 1023.5% of ATK plus 54 to targets in the area, and strongly suspends them. Damage immunity lasts 2.6 seconds when the skill is active (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Alyss
weapon_description: Combat armor crafted with a foot-blade as its core. Powered by the user's mental energy, it is the result of cutting-edge science and technology from before the Cataclysm, and explodes with terrifying power when necessary.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will strongly freeze targets for 2 seconds and leave them frostbitten for 6 seconds. Breaking the ice shell deals damage equal to {1}% of ATK. While frostbitten, the target's weapon charge rate is reduced by 50%.

Frost Reaction: Increase frost ATK by 20% and frost resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more frost weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Frost Resonance or Frost Reaction effects, with Frost Resonance taking precedence.

Receive Alyss's Support when using any frost weapon skill in the Chilling Field, summoning Alyss to cast a discharge skill on the field, which is the equivalent of Wanderer casting a discharge skill. The skill that triggers the discharge skill will then be used again afterward.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
Receive Alyss's Support every time Starry Night is triggered and increase Starry Night and Hoarfrost Damage by 10% for 12 seconds. Stack up to 3 times.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

Increase the damage of Unyielding Wing's normal attack and Spatial Slice by 35%. The Wanderer receives Alyss's Protection upon taking lethal damage, protecting the Wanderer from death 1 time and making the Wanderer immune to damage for a short time. Cooldown: 60 seconds.
Increase frost damage by 12% when Alyss's Support reaches 3 stacks.
While on the ground, use Unyielding Wing to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 101.3% of ATK plus 5 and knock the target back a short distance.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 107.3% of ATK plus 6 and knock the target back significantly.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 116.4% of ATK plus 6 and knock the target back a short distance.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 141.8% of ATK plus 7 and suspend the target.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 241.5% of ATK plus 13 and launch the target.
While airborne, use normal attack to attack 5 times in a row in mid-air and consume endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 72.1% of ATK plus 4.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 65.6% of ATK plus 3.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 115.8% of ATK plus 6.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 131.1% of ATK plus 7.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 343.9% of ATK plus 18 and deliver a knockdown.

While using Swan Arc, tap and hold normal attack to pull the targets together and deal damage equal to 506.5% of ATK plus 27 to all targets within range. The last hit strongly suspends the target and deals damage equal to 95% of ATK plus 5.
Passive: After entering Latent State for 4 seconds or using any weapon skill, become immune to damage during the next Dancing Flash.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne (tap when a target is available), or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetpack to trigger Pummel.
While falling, deal damage equal to 95% of ATK plus 5 each hit and continuously consume endurance.

Tap and hold normal attack to deal damage equal to 167.2% of ATK plus 9 each time the target is hit. The last hit deals damage equal to 190% of ATK plus 10. Gain hyperbody during this time and continuously consume endurance.
After dodging backward, tap normal attack 3 times consecutively to deal total damage equal to 958% of ATK plus 50 to the target, and strongly suspend the target with the first hit.

Dodge before holding to enter Latent State, during which endurance is constantly consumed and speed is increased by 50%. Increase speed by an additional 50% in the Chilling Field. When exiting Latent State, deal damage equal to 492.1% of ATK plus 26 to all nearby targets and freeze them for 2 seconds.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.

Pull nearby targets together, then deal damage equal to 982.5% of ATK plus 52 to them and strongly suspend them. The Wanderer enters the Chilling Field for 30 seconds. Cooldown: 25 seconds. Gain hyperbody when activating the skill.

Passive: When using any frost weapon discharge skill in the Chilling Field, deal Hoarfrost Damage equal to 262.1% of ATK plus 14 1 time and slow the target for 2 seconds (the slow effect is ineffective against bosses). While in the field, for every 12 times Unyielding Wing's hit effect is triggered, further triggers Spatial Slice, dealing damage equal to 270% of ATK plus 14 1 time to targets in the space every 2 seconds for 25 seconds (this also stops when the space disappears).

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and unleash a discharge skill, dealing damage equal to 727.9% of ATK plus 38 and strongly launching the target. During this period, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Umi
weapon_description: The whip favored by the new Executor, Umi. Umi's favorite part of it is that she doesn't get tripped up by it, usually.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will cause enemies to become grievous for 7 seconds, increasing their damage received by 20% and dealing damage equal to {1}% of ATK. When in team play, physical damage dealt to grievous targets is increased by an additional 20%.

Physical Reaction: Increase physical ATK by 20% and physical resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more physical weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Physical Resonance or Physical Reaction effects, with Physical Resonance taking precedence.
Gain the Psychic Puppet effect upon entering Magic Trick, increasing Mobius's physical damage boost to 15%. During Magic Trick, recover 2% of Max HP and 10 weapon charge every second.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.

When ending Magic Trick early, deal wide-area damage over 13 seconds. The cooldown of Mobius's next skill is reduced, and physical damage is increased by 25% for a period of time. If Magic Trick has more than 13 seconds remaining, gain an additional 200 weapon charge. The more time remaining when Magic Trick ends, the higher the area damage, the greater the skill cooldown reduction, and the longer the physical damage boost lasts (this effect does not apply to Mobius). The area damage dealt is capped at 200% of ATK (the maximum damage is dealt when the remaining time is more than 13 seconds). The maximum cooldown reduction is 13 seconds, and the physical damage boost can last up to 20 seconds.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

When switching to Mobius, immediately gain 30 warmup points. Cooldown: 17 seconds. Upon entering Magic Trick, deal area damage equal to 840% of ATK to nearby targets and reduce their physical resistance by 10% for 20 seconds.

During Magic Trick, Mobius has an additional whip that is automatically swung whenever the Wanderer uses Mobius to deal normal attacks or dodge attacks, dealing damage equal to 100% of Mobius's ATK (this damage is not counted as dealing normal attacks).
While on the ground, use Mobius to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 76.9% of ATK plus 4 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 84.4% of ATK plus 4 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 112.1% of ATK plus 6 and knock the target down.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 105.5% of ATK plus 6 and drag and drop the target.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 265.1% of ATK plus 14 and launch the target.
Increase shatter by an additional 50%.
While airborne, use normal attack to attack 5 times in a row in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 46% of ATK plus 2.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 66.5% of ATK plus 4.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 88.4% of ATK plus 5.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 88.8% of ATK plus 5.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 260.5% of ATK plus 14.

While using Basic Technique on the ground, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Out of the Blue directly based on the currently locked-on target. Smaller locked-on targets are dealt damage equal to 105% of ATK plus 6 and draw in nearby targets. Larger locked-on targets are dealt damage equal to 85.5% of ATK plus 5 and draw in nearby targets. This skill's shatter is additionally increased by 50%.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne, or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetpack to trigger Pummel.
Plummet from the skies, dealing damage equal to 121.5% of ATK plus 6 and launching the target.

Tap and hold normal attack on the ground to charge Anticipation, and release the button to trigger Close-up Magic based on the currently locked-on target. Smaller locked-on targets are dealt damage equal to 105% of ATK plus 6 and draw in nearby targets. Larger locked-on targets are dealt damage equal to 85.5% of ATK plus 5 and draw in nearby targets. This skill's shatter is additionally increased by 50%.

Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Grand Illusion, dealing damage equal to 187.2% of ATK plus 10 to nearby targets. This skill's shatter is additionally increased by 50%.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of enemies within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging for 0.5 seconds.

Dealing damage with any weapon in the main slot will accrue warmup points. Cooldown: 0.1 seconds. Physical weapons accrue 3 points with each hit, and non-physical weapons accrue 1.5 points with each hit. The number of warmup points you have are displayed in the Magic Gauge, up to 100 points. When entering battle, immediately gain 100 warmup points.

Skills can be cast once there are 100 warmup points in the Magic Gauge. Pull together enemies in a certain area and deal damage equal to 950% of ATK plus 50 to the target. Become temporarily invincible (unavailable in Apex League and The Critical Abyss) and reduce the speed of targets within the hit area (unavailable in Apex League and The Critical Abyss). At the same time, activate Magic Trick to continuously consume warmup points. Cooldown: 30 seconds. This cooldown is not affected by effects (including the clearance, reset, or change of the cooldown time) that are not from Mobius for 18 seconds. During this time, the skill button is replaced with a Cut Card button.

During Magic Trick, automatically get either a Spade or Heart Poker Card every 2 seconds. The type of Poker Cards that will soon be obtained can be switched in advance with the Cut Card button. When there are 2 Poker Cards, the corresponding Card Magic will be automatically used. Cooldown: 3.8 seconds.

If you have hyperbody during Magic Trick, your Magic Gauge will no longer be automatically supplemented, as you are already shielded. Increase the physical damage of Mobius's attacks (normal attack and dodge attack) by 60% and shatter by 20%.
Different Poker Card combinations will activate different Card Magic effects.
Heart + Spade → Psychic Puppet
Heart + Heart → Contradiction Corrosion
Spade + Spade → Card Sweep
Magic Trick ends when switching to another weapon in any way or upon death.
Gain hyperbody for 20 seconds when Magic Trick ends. If it ends naturally, deals additional damage equal to 1,200% of ATK to nearby targets.

Pull out a colony of bats from your hat and enhance yourself. During Magic Trick, physical damage dealt by Mobius is increased by 20%, and only 40% of the damage taken will be tallied. The remaining 60% will slowly be deducted from your HP 10 seconds after Magic Trick ends. The delayed tally effect only applies when Fortitude Resonance is not active.
Immediately recover 15% of Max HP and plant a Corrosion Flower on up to 7 targets within a certain range, which deals damage equal to 360% of ATK every second for 3 seconds.
Summon a large number of flying cards, forming a hurricane that swarms to the target location, attacking the target up to 12 times and dealing total damage equal to 1450% of ATK.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and cast Sleight of Hand and gain temporary invincibility (unavailable in Apex League and The Critical Abyss). Upon landing, deal damage equal to 316.2% of ATK plus 17 to the target. After swinging the whip, deal damage equal to 737.8% of ATK plus 39 to the target and strongly launch the target.

name: Fenrir
weapon_description: A special device that converts sound waves into attack. When the shackles are shattered, the currents of death become sharp claws that tear everything apart.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will strongly paralyze targets for 1 second and electrify them for 6 seconds, removing all their buffs and dealing damage equal to {1}% of ATK. Electrified targets can't receive any buffs for the next 6 seconds.

Volt Resonance: Increase volt ATK by 20% and volt resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more volt weapons. This set effect also works with weapons in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Volt Resonance or Volt Reaction effects, with Volt Resonance taking precedence.
Elemental Balancing: Increase all ATK by 15%. Activate by equipping 3 weapons of different elements. This set effect also works with weapons in the off-hand slot.

When Su-Paw-Star summons a consciousness and is on cooldown, gain the Aural Fever skill. Rush to the target and attack multiple times, dealing damage up to 1,542% of ATK. Each hit landed slows the enemy for a brief period and restores HP equal to 100% of ATK. If the last hit lands on the target, place 2 musical notes on the target. Aural Fever has a 15-second cooldown.
When 3 or more notes are detonated and the cooldown of Aural Fever is greater than 5 seconds, reset the cooldown of Aural Fever. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
While Songworld is active:
For every 45% of Max HP lost or when using the skill Aural Fever, trigger a Songworld Quake which deals damage equal to 1,215% of ATK to targets in the Songworld.
For every 99% of Max HP lost, gain 1 escape death for 45 seconds (block a lethal effect and become immune to damage for a short time), stacking up to 1 time.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
Increase the damage multiplier of Musical Notes' detonation to 70%, and the DoT against the intoxicated target to 2% of Max HP every second.
While Songworld is active, Songworld Quake is triggered automatically if it doesn't trigger for 12 seconds while in combat.
Increase Crit Rate by 30% while wielding Gleipnir. The Crit Rate increase lasts another 5 seconds after switching to other weapons.
While on the ground, attack 7 times.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 80.4% of ATK plus 4.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 89.5% of ATK plus 5.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 89.5% of ATK plus 5.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 141.2% of ATK plus 7.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 89.5% of ATK plus 5.
Sixth Attack: Deal damage equal to 252.7% of ATK plus 13.
Seventh Attack: Deal damage equal to 279.3% of ATK plus 15.
While airborne or after jumping once, use normal attack to attack 7 times in a row in mid-air.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 87.4% of ATK plus 5.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 100.5% of ATK plus 5.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 100.5% of ATK plus 5.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 174.8% of ATK plus 9.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 131.1% of ATK plus 7.
Sixth Attack: Deal damage equal to 303.2% of ATK plus 16.
Seventh Attack: Deal damage equal to 335.2% of ATK plus 18.
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack during the second to the fourth normal attack to trigger Wolfbite.
Charge forward quickly, dealing damage equal to 114% of ATK plus 6 and knocking the target back.
After triggering Wolfbite, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Upswipe.
Swipe upward, dealing damage equal to 153.9% of ATK plus 8 and suspending the target.
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack during the fifth or the sixth normal attack to trigger Menacing Hunt.
Descend from above, gaining temporary invincibility and dealing damage equal to 420.3% of ATK plus 22 and suspending the target.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne (tap when a target is available), or tap normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using a jetpack to trigger Thick and Fast.
Descend from above, dealing damage equal to 330.6% of ATK plus 17 upon landing and suspending surrounding targets.
After triggering Thick and Fast, tap and hold normal attack again to trigger Roar.
Let out a terrifying Roar in all directions and gain temporary invincibility, dealing damage equal to 330.6% of ATK plus 17 to nearby targets and knocking them back.
While airborne, tap and hold normal attack when using the second to the seventh Unshackle to trigger Trailing Note.
Roam through the air multiple times and deal damage equal to 458.3% of ATK plus 24 to surrounding targets.
Each time a target is hit by a normal attack, there is a 50% chance to place 1 note on the target that lasts 15 seconds, stacking up to 5 notes.
Wolfbite, Menacing Hunt, and Thick and Fast has a 100% chance to place 1 note on the target on hit.
Notes can only be placed at least 1 second apart.

Passive: Trailing Note and Melody will detonate all the musical notes on the target on hit, dealing damage equal to 35% of ATK times the number of musical notes detonated. Damage is doubled if 3 or more notes are detonated.
Passive: Intoxicate the target after detonating 2 or more musical notes, dealing damage equal to 1% of Max HP every second for 16 seconds.
Damage from musical note detonation and intoxication is considered dodge attack damage.
Attack with claws, dealing damage equal to 383.2% of ATK plus 20 to surrounding targets and knocking them down.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, which reduces the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.
Passive: Place a musical note on the target.

Summon a consciousness that is separate from the target, dealing damage equal to 225.7% of ATK plus 12 on hit. Create a Songworld at the Wanderer's current location that lasts 30 seconds, in which damage taken by the Wanderer is reduced by 8% while ignoring 35% of the target's defense.

The consciousness has HP equal to 30 times the Wanderer's Max HP. When it takes non-passive damage from Gleipnir, 100% of the damage is transferred to the target's main body (1% for Wanderers), while restoring HP equal to 50% of ATK to the Wanderer. While the consciousness is active, the Wanderer takes 12% less damage from the target's main body. The consciousness will exist for up to 15 seconds.
After the consciousness returns to the target's main body, deal area damage equal to 1282.5% of ATK plus 68.
Recalling the consciousness: The consciousness returns to its main body when it's defeated, when its duration runs out, when a new consciousness is summoned, or when it strays too far from the body.
Su-Paw-Star cooldown: 30 seconds.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer, then rush to the target and attack the targets within range, dealing damage up to 1203.3% of ATK plus 63 and placing 3 musical notes on them. While the skill is active, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Lan
weapon_description: A parasol weapon used exclusively by Zhuque with various hidden mechanisms. Vermilion Bird's large parasol body can not only become a powerful tool to destroy enemies using energy, but also something to block the sight of others and hide the holder's demeanor...

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will ignite the target for 8 seconds, dealing damage equal to {3}% of ATK every second. While ignited, targets' healing effect is reduced by 50%.

Flame Resonance: Increase flame ATK by 20% and flame resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more flame weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Flame Resonance or Flame Reaction effects, with Flame Resonance taking precedence.
Vermilion Strength: When equipping Vermilion Bird, the ammo costs, damage, charge, and shatter effects of other weapons are multiplied by Polyfeather Parasol.

Glowing Fire: When nearby targets trigger burn tally or take damage from Fiery Crash, 30% of the damage is transferred to the 3 highest HP percentage units near the target (including the target itself).
Increase the current weapon's base HP growth by 16%.

Passive 1: When using any weapon discharge attack or shatter, all parasols in the vicinity trigger 1 Fiery Crash at 30% effectiveness. Reduce the ATK of enemies near the parasols by 15%. When in combat, spawn 3 parasols near the target immediately after dealing damage for the first time.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
Fiery Crash and the transferred damage ignore 50% of the target's flame resistance.
Flame damage dealt by Corrosion is increased by 10%.
Increase the damage dealt by Dancing Flames and Soaring Strike by 50%.
When calculating the effects of spinning parasols, Phoenix Sweep, and Fiery Crash add 2 to Polyfeather Paraso.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 94.8% of ATK plus 5 and knock the target back a short distance.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 129.8% of ATK plus 7 and knock the target back significantly.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 221.3% of ATK plus 12 and suspend the target.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 241.3% of ATK plus 13 and knock the target down.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 304.1% of ATK plus 16 and knock the target back.
While airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 attacks in a row in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 106.3% of ATK plus 6.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 129.8% of ATK plus 7.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 158.1% of ATK plus 8.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 165.3% of ATK plus 9.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 296.3% of ATK plus 16.
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack during the second to the fifth normal attack to trigger Blazing Wings.
Dash forward quickly and suspend self, dealing damage equal to 125% of ATK plus 7 to nearby targets and strongly suspending them.
While airborne, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Molten Heart. Then, continue to consume endurance and gain hyperbody.
Control Vermilion Bird and deal damage equal to 25% of ATK plus 1 to nearby targets, and command the parasols to spin rapidly.
Release normal attack to fall. While falling, each attack that lands on the target deals damage equal to 50% of ATK plus 3, and knocks down the target.

Passive: When the parasols are spinning rapidly, the feathers consumed every second by Flame Vortex is multiplied by Polyfeather Parasol, and the damage, charge, and shatter effects from Flame Vortex are also multiplied by Polyfeather Parasol.
Feathers: Gain 1 automatically every second, and 1 for every time damage is dealt. Cooldown: 0.5 seconds. Feathers can be stored up to 30.
Polyfeather Parasol = 1 plus the number of parasols.
While not in combat, tap and hold normal attack on the ground to spawn a parasol at the designated location for 15 seconds, or until combat starts.
While not in combat, use the skill to move to where the parasol is, and use double-jump to glide. Cooldown: 6 seconds.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.

Fly toward the parasols in the same order that they spawned, and return to the original position. The flying trail lasts 5 seconds, and targets near the trail are slowed by 50%. While gliding, become immune to damage (unavailable in Apex League). Cooldown: 12 seconds.
Every time the Wanderer passes through a parasol, deal area damage equal to 333.3% of ATK plus 18 and make the parasol spin rapidly for 5 seconds.
When a weapon's normal attack or a dodge attack hits, 1 parasol spawns near the target for 20 seconds. Cooldown: 1.5 seconds. Up to 3 parasols may be active at any given time.
Fiery Crash: During Devastating Glide, for each parasol passed through, deal additional damage equal to 180% of ATK multiplied by the number of Polyfeather Parasol.
Corrosion: Targets near the parasols take 10% more flame damage and 12% more damage from charged attacks.
Radiant Flames: Parasols deal burn damage equal to 195% of ATK every second for 4 seconds.
Flame Vortex: Active parasols consume 1 feather every second and deal area damage equal to 91% of ATK plus 5 (damage and feather cost from multiple parasols don't stack).
While Devastating Glide is active, pass through 3 parasols before returning to the original position to gain Vermilion Domain, gaining hyperbody and 60% damage reduction for 8 seconds.
While diving, Vermilion Domain deals damage equal to 50% of ATK plus 3 to nearby targets every second and increases speed by 30%.
After activating Fortitude Resonance:
Successfully using any weapon skill will taunt nearby targets for 2.5 seconds.
When using Devastating Glide, the Vermilion Domain expands, granting hyperbody and 40% damage reduction to nearby teammates.
When using Molten Heart, Vermilion Domain's timer is stopped.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer, dealing damage equal to 1180% of ATK plus 62 to the target, during which damage immunity lasts for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).
Passive: A successful hit increases flame damage by 3% of Polyfeather Parasol for 20 seconds.

name: Icarus
weapon_description: A rare collectible weapon fused with unique trendy refits. May the wielder walk with courage into the desolate darkness, even if like a moth to the flame.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will strongly freeze targets for 2 seconds and leave them frostbitten for 6 seconds. Breaking the ice shell deals damage equal to {1}% of ATK. While frostbitten, the target's weapon charge rate is reduced by 50%.

Frost Resonance: Increase frost ATK by 15% and frost resistance by 25%. Activate by equipping 2 or more frost weapons. This set effect also works with weapons in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Frost Resonance or Frost Reaction effects, with Frost Resonance taking precedence.
Elementalist: Increase final damage by 1.5% for every 1 type of weapon element equipped. This set effect also works with weapons in the off-hand slot.

When any weapon skill is used, Speedy Yo-yo can trigger harmony, dealing damage to nearby targets equal to 25% of the Wanderer's lost HP. The damage dealt shall be no less than 120% of the Wanderer's Max ATK, and no more than 800% of the Wanderer's Max ATK. The type of elemental damage dealt will be that of the current weapon.

When any weapon discharge is used, Speedy Yo-yo can trigger tuning, dealing damage to nearby targets equal to 4% of the Wanderer's Max HP. The damage dealt shall be no more than 400% of the Wanderer's Max ATK. The type of elemental damage dealt will be that of the current weapon.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.

When using Desolate Day, Speedy Yo-yo can trigger 9 seconds of swiftness: Speedy Yo-yo's speed is increased by 80%, damage is increased by 60%, and damage caused by passing through the target is converted to minor area damage.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
Increases the damage of Speedy Yo-yo and Return to Loneliness by 50%.
Increase final damage by 6% while Speedy Yo-yo is active.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 185.3% of ATK plus 10 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 215.7% of ATK plus 11 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 352.3% of ATK plus 19 and suspend the target.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 543.4% of ATK plus 29 and knock the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 367.7% of ATK plus 19 and launch the target.
While airborne, use normal attack to attack 5 times in a row in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 218.5% of ATK plus 12.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 262.2% of ATK plus 14.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 410.8% of ATK plus 22.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 568.1% of ATK plus 30.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 552.9% of ATK plus 29 and launch the target.
While using normal attack on the ground, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Piercing Cold, dealing damage equal to 570% of ATK plus 30.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne (tap when a target is available), or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using a Jetpack to trigger Sharp Chill.
While falling, deal damage equal to 95% of ATK plus 5 each hit. Upon landing, deal damage equal to 570% of ATK plus 30 and launch the target.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.
Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (use a directional button before dodging) to trigger Snowy Flurry, dealing damage equal to 269.2% of ATK plus 14 to nearby targets.
Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Winter Solstice, dealing damage equal to 269.2% of ATK plus 14 damage to nearby targets.

Deal damage to nearby targets up to 1950% of ATK plus 103 and create 2 regulation Speedy Yo-yos. Cooldown: 60 seconds. Reduce the speed of targets within range of Desolate Day by 50% (does not affect Wanderers or bosses).

Each Speedy Yo-yo passes through the center of the trajectory about 4 times in each motion cycle, dealing damage equal to 100% of ATK plus 5 to targets within the trajectory, for 70 seconds. The motion cycle lasts for 4 seconds when the weapon is 0 stars. During this period, using Desolate Day will refresh the position and duration of the Speedy Yo-yo. Cooldown: 4 seconds.

While Desolate Day is in use, reduce damage taken by 50% and recover 5% of Max HP. This cannot be affected by any healing boost effects. Recovery and damage reduction will not take effect in Apex League.

Use Capped Knowledge to obtain up to 2 uses of the new skill Return to Loneliness. This skill can only be used while Desolate Day is in cooldown. Deal skill damage equal to 1300% of ATK plus 68. While the skill is in use, reduce damage taken by 50% and recover 5% of Max HP. This cannot be affected by any incoming or outgoing healing boost effects. Recovery and damage reduction will not take effect in Apex League.

While Fortitude Resonance is active: Use Return to Loneliness and taunt nearby targets to gain 1 stack of blocking shield, up to 3 stacks, for 20 seconds. Blocking points are equal to the sum of the Wanderer's 5 resistance types. When the blocking shield is used up or overflows, deal damage equal to 200% of blocking points to the main target.

While Benediction Resonance is active: Using Return to Loneliness against targets with greater than 95% HP will deal damage equal to 8% of their respective Max HP (does not affect Wanderers). This cannot be affected by damage boost or reduction effects.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer, dealing damage equal to 1662.5% of ATK plus 88 to all nearby targets, and launching the target. During this period, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Fiona
weapon_description: A strange nanoweapon that generates blades that cut through metal like butter. In the past, it used to take the form of a bracelet that wrapped around its owner's wrist while in standby mode, and that is where its owner's descriptions of it come from.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will mark the target, causing an explosion after 5 seconds. Additionally, inflict damage equal to 25% of all damage received by the target during the duration of the mark, up to a total of 560% of the Wanderer's ATK. Only 1 mark can exist on a target at a time.

Altered Resonance: Increase ATK by 30% and altered resistance by 60%. Activate by equipping 2 or more altered weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Altered Resonance or Altered Reaction effects, with Altered Resonance taking precedence.
Using any weapon or discharge skill grants 1 elemental crystal, up to 5 crystals. Elemental crystals are lost at a rate of 1 crystal every 6 seconds.
Elemental crystals provide a final damage boost equal to 4% of [(crystal count plus 1)/2] and an increased healing effect equal to 6% of [(crystal count plus 1)/2].
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
While Benediction Resonance is not active, when the target's HP is below (crystal count plus 2)%, using Moonstar Bracelet can instantly execute the target (doesn't work against Wanderers).
While Benediction Resonance is active, when the target's HP is below (crystal count times 2 plus 2)%, using Moonstar Bracelet can instantly execute the target (doesn't work against Wanderers).
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
Obtain 1 elemental crystal every time Scatter Technique is used. Elemental crystals are lost at a rate of 1 crystal every 20 seconds.
When receiving lethal damage, consume 3 elemental crystals to prevent death 1 time and gain damage immunity for a short time. Can be activated 1 time every 25 seconds.
Increase final damage by 8% of [(crystal count plus 3)/2].
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 7 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 74.9% of ATK plus 4.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 78.6% of ATK plus 4.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 123.6% of ATK plus 7.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 186.6% of ATK plus 10.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 209.7% of ATK plus 11.
Sixth Attack: Deal damage equal to 140.4% of ATK plus 7.
Seventh Attack: Deal damage equal to 542.1% of ATK plus 29.
While airborne or after jumping once, use normal attack to launch 7 consecutive attacks in mid-air and consume endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 100.5% of ATK plus 5.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 105.5% of ATK plus 6.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to151.9% of ATK plus 8.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 216.6% of ATK plus 11.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 210.9% of ATK plus 11.
Sixth Attack: Deal damage equal to 157% of ATK plus 8.
Seventh Attack: Deal damage equal to 587.6% of ATK plus 31.
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack between the second and sixth normal attack to trigger Converging Ripples.

The Wanderer will become airborne and fire several water bombs ahead while continuously consuming endurance, each hit dealing damage equal to 150% of ATK plus 8 to nearby targets (counts as a charged attack), knocking the targets back.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne (tap when a target is available), or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetpack to trigger Moonrain.
Fall from above, dealing damage equal to 175% of ATK plus 9 to targets upon reaching the ground, and suspend them.
While in mid-air, tap and hold normal attack between the second and sixth normal attack to trigger Torrential Convergence.
Fire several water bombs ahead while continuously consuming endurance, each hit dealing damage equal to 150% of ATK plus 8 to nearby targets (counts as a charged attack), knocking the targets back.
While Benediction Resonance is active:

Tap and hold normal attack while on the ground to select a teammate, then release to link the Wanderer to that teammate. When their link is in effect, the pair cannot make a link or be linked again. The link ends when one of the two is defeated/the selected ally has made another link/it exceeds the range.
The linked ally's healing received from the link starter's Moonstar Bracelet is increased by 50%.
When the linked ally activates Fortitude Resonance, an extra 50% of resistance is transmitted to the linked ally.
When the linked ally activates Balance Resonance/Attack Resonance, an extra 20% of ATK is transmitted to the linked ally (no more than 20,000).
When the linked ally activates Benediction Resonance, the outgoing healing effect of the pair is additionally increased by 30%.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.

Passive: Recover HP equal to 200% of ATK for the Wanderer and nearby allies when dodging, and remove 8 points of Graying Bite from the Wanderer. While Benediction Resonance is active, gain an additional 50 weapon charge.
Roam ahead several times, dealing damage up to 160% of ATK plus 8 to targets in the area.
Unleash a water jet, dealing damage up to 90% of ATK plus 5 to targets in the area and suspending them.
Tidal Eruption: Deal damage equal to 680% of ATK plus 36 and strongly suspend targets in the area. Cooldown: 30 seconds.
Passive: Scatter
Gain Scatter Technique after equipping Moonstar Bracelet. Up to 2 out of 6 Scatter Techniques can be activated via Skills - Settings.
Controls: Tap the special skill button to use the Scatter Technique.

When a Scatter Technique is attached to Crashing Falls, using Crashing Falls will automatically trigger the Scatter Technique, and the skill cooldown will be replaced by the Scatter Technique cooldown.
Surging Tides: Deal damage up to 1500% of ATK plus 79 to nearby targets, increasing all elemental damage by 10% for 20 seconds.
Cooldown: 14 seconds.

Summon multiple waterspouts, pulling nearby targets together and dealing damage up to 1800% of ATK plus 95. A large waterspout is formed shortly after, dealing damage equal to 800% of ATK plus 42 to nearby targets.
Damage dealt by Vortex counts as skill and discharge damage.
Cooldown: 12 seconds.
Bath in Torrents: Gain 60 weapon charge every second. Increase skill damage by 20% and discharge damage by 20% for 35 seconds.
Using Torrential Force counts as using the current weapon's discharge skill (without the effect).
Shimmering Radiance hits reset Torrential Force's cooldown.
Cooldown: 30 seconds.

Encompassing Waves: Gain a final damage boost that increases over time, up to 32% (maxes out in 10 seconds). This effect does not stack with repeated uses of Maelstrom and is lost upon switching weapons.
Cooldown: 30 seconds.

Execute Aqua Prison on the target for 3 seconds. The target is unable to move or use skills for the duration of Aqua Prison, and their resistance is reduced by 8% for 15 seconds (doesn't work against Wanderers).
The resistance-reducing effect of Aqua Shackles is doubled while diving.
Cooldown: 15 seconds.
Arcane Vitality: Gain a (Max HP/115,000)% all elemental damage boost, up to 30%. Gain another 25% increase to all elemental damage for 20 seconds when your Max HP is over 2,600,000.
Cooldown: 15 seconds.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and unleash Moonstar's Breath, dealing damage up to 1500% of ATK plus 79 to nearby targets. During this period, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League). Recover HP equal to 400% of ATK and remove 16 points of Graying Bite. Remove delay and gain delay immunity for 5 seconds.
Passive: Moonstar
While Attack/Balance Resonance is active, when Shimmering Radiance lands a hit, increase ATK by 20% for 30 seconds.

While Fortitude Resonance is active, every time Shimmering Radiance is used, increase all resistance by 8% for 30 seconds, stacking up to 5 times. When HP is lower than 30%, gain an extra 80% damage reduction for 5 seconds, which can be triggered once every 60 seconds.

While Benediction Resonance is active, Shimmering Radiance's HP recovery heals all teammates and creates 1 stack of Moonshield that negates damage 1 time for 10 seconds. This effect does not stack, and every use of Shimmering Radiance increases the healing effect of the next use by 20%, up to 40%. This effect lasts for 30 seconds.

name: Gnonno
weapon_description: Far too dangerous to be a child's plaything. There is no way a kid could have gotten their hands on it through honest means. Who knows what kind of tech was used to refit it... Maybe it was simply picked up somewhere off the beaten path.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will cause enemies to become grievous for 7 seconds, increasing their damage received by 20% and dealing damage equal to {1}% of ATK. When in team play, physical damage dealt to grievous targets is increased by an additional 20%.

Physical Resonance: Increase physical ATK by 15% and physical resistance by 25%. Activate by equipping 2 or more physical weapons. This set effect also works with weapons in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Physical Resonance or Physical Reaction effects, with Physical Resonance taking precedence.
Universal Resonance: Increase final damage by 15%. Activate by equipping 2 weapons of the same element, not including physical. This set effect works in the off-hand slot.
Increase the shatter of Frantic Digging, Boiling Octopus Balls, and Go on, Pip! by 80%.

Gain a 50% increase to Shield when these skills are used when the Wanderer's Shield is below 50%. Lasts 8 seconds. This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 5 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
Pip Octowhip limit is increased to 45.
Increase physical damage by 25% for 30 seconds after using Pip Ultimate.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
Detonating Treasure Tracers refreshes the grievous status of targets.
Increase physical damage by 25% when damage is dealt to targets with less than 80% HP. This set effect works in the off-hand slot.
Increase damage dealt by detonating Treasure Tracers by 140% of ATK.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 184.6% of ATK plus 10 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 216.7% of ATK plus 11 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 179.6% of ATK plus 9 and knock the target back.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 490.3% of ATK plus 26 and continuously knocking the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 528.5% of ATK plus 28 and launch the target.
While airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 attacks in a row in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 220.6% of ATK plus 12.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 184.4% of ATK plus 10.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 169.4% of ATK plus 9.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 307.7% of ATK plus 16.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 412% of ATK plus 22.
When on the ground, tap and hold normal attack for the first to third normal attack to trigger Frantic Digging.

Continuously attack forward in place while consuming endurance, during which the Wanderer gains hyperbody. Every attack that lands deals damage to nearby targets equal to 90.1% of ATK plus 5 and causes the target to become grievous, lasting 7 seconds.
During Frantic Digging, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Boiling Octopus Balls.

Continuously attack forward while consuming endurance, during which the Wanderer gains hyperbody. Every attack that lands deals damage equal to 90.1% of ATK plus 5 to nearby targets. Once normal attack is released, deal damage equal to 135.1% of ATK plus 7 to nearby targets and cause them to become grievous for 7 seconds.
Use the directional controls to move during Boiling Octopus Balls.
When on the ground, tap and hold normal attack or hold during the fourth normal attack to trigger Go on, Pip!

Continuously move forward while attacking and consuming endurance, during which the Wanderer gains hyperbody. Every attack that lands deals damage equal to 90.1% of ATK plus 5 to nearby targets, knocking the target back and causing them to become grievous, lasting for 7 seconds.
Use the directional controls to move during Go on, Pip!
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne (tap when a target is available), or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetpack to trigger Waterspout Spike.
Fall from above, dealing damage equal to 418% of ATK plus 22 to nearby targets upon reaching the ground, and launching them.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.
Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Tentacle Counter, dealing damage to nearby targets equal to 94.4% of ATK plus 5.
Passive: Delay targets by 60%, and deal damage equal to 30% of ATK per second. lasting 5 seconds. This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 10 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).
Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (use a directional button before dodging) to trigger Pursuing Tentacle, dealing damage equal to 265.6% of ATK plus 14 to nearby targets.

Enter a charging state and become temporarily invincible (unavailable in Apex League). Draw in nearby targets, dealing damage to them equal to 81.8% of ATK plus 4 each time an attack lands. Cooldown: 20 seconds (cooldown starts upon entering charging state).
Upon releasing, detonate all Treasure Tracers on nearby targets and cause Octowhip to enter a Rampage state, increasing the speed of coordinated attacks by 100%, lasting for 12 seconds.
Different release timings can be chosen depending on the number of Minisquids above the Wanderer.
Total Berserk: When the number of Minisquids equals 2, release to deal damage to nearby targets equal to 1200% of ATK plus 63.
Partial Berserk: When the number of Minisquids is 1 or 3, release to deal damage to nearby targets equal to 840% of ATK plus 44.

Prowling Clones: Gain 15 Octowhips when in combat, which attack locked-on targets, dealing damage equal to 125% of ATK and consuming 1 Octowhip each time an attack lands. A maximum of 30 Octowhips can be stored at a time.
Pip Octowhip Place 1 Treasure Tracer on targets each time they are hit by an Octowhip which lasts for 20 seconds, for a maximum of 3 stacks.
Detonate 1 Treasure Tracer stack whenever physical damage aside from Octowhip is dealt to a target, dealing damage equal to 70% of ATK. This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 0.1 seconds.
Gain 1 Octowhip whenever a discharge skill from any weapon hits a target. This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 0.1 seconds.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and briefly submerge the Wanderer, dealing damage to nearby targets equal to 480% of ATK +25 upon emerging. Upon landing, deal damage to nearby targets equal to 1120% of ATK + 59, and gain the maximum number of Pip Octowhip. When the skill is active, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Rubilia
weapon_description: A gentle swing in the chaotic abyss will stir up a tempest that affects everyone's fate.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will strongly paralyze targets for 1 second and electrify them for 6 seconds, removing all their buffs and dealing damage equal to {1}% of ATK. Electrified targets can't receive any buffs for the next 6 seconds.

Volt Resonance: Increase volt ATK by 20% and volt resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more volt weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Volt Resonance or Volt Reaction effects, with Volt Resonance taking precedence.
After triggering Feedback, every Crystamax thorn will deal damage to nearby targets equal to 193.3% of ATK every 2 seconds, lasting 30 seconds.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
Using the weapon skill or the discharge skill of any other weapon will generate 1 Crystamax thorn.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
Increase Feedback's Max HP recovery of Crystamax thorns to 50%.
After successfully using Harrah's Embrace, increase volt damage by an additional 12% for 30 seconds.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 137.3% of ATK plus 7 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 101.3% of ATK plus 5 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 191.9% of ATK plus 10 and suspend the target.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 439.6% of ATK plus 23 and knock the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 276.5% of ATK plus 15 and knock the target down.
While airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 attacks in a row in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 165.5% of ATK plus 9.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 130.3% of ATK plus 7.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 254.8% of ATK plus 13.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 499.5% of ATK plus 26.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 248.2% of ATK plus 13.
While attacking on the ground, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Advance, dealing damage equal to 294% of ATK plus 15.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne (tap when a target is available), or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetpack to trigger Descent.
Dive through the air, consuming endurance and dealing damage equal to 380% of ATK plus 20 to nearby targets upon reaching the ground.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.
Tap normal attack during the perfect dodge window (tap an arrow button before dodging forward) to trigger Pillage, dealing damage equal to 159.6% of ATK plus 8 to nearby targets and suspending them.
Using Pillage can trigger Feedback.
Use normal attack right after dodging to trigger Swarm, summoning two Abyssant illusions which deal damage equal to 252% of ATK plus 13 to targets ahead.
Using Swarm can trigger Feedback.
When on the ground, holding any dodge can trigger Weave, dashing for a distance toward the sky (does not work in areas where Jetpack can't be used).

Tap and hold normal attack right after dodging to trigger Seal, launching a hive consciousness forward which controls Grayspace Entities that it hits, turning them into allies for 60 seconds (does not work on bosses).
The control state is removed when Seal is used again on an affected target or its duration ends, dealing 45% of all damage dealt by the Wanderer during the control period.
The hive consciousness can be resisted by non-Grayspace Entity targets, which are not affected by this control effect.

Dash rapidly between two points 10 times, drawing in nearby targets and dealing damage equal to 1115.2% of ATK plus 59 to nearby targets. Upon landing, deal damage equal to 594.8% of ATK plus 31 to nearby targets. Cooldown: 30 seconds.

Each dash absorbs 10% of the Max HP of all Crystamax thorns (unavailable in Apex League), and deals additional damage equal to the number of Crystamax thorns times 165% of ATK, or the number of Crystamax thorns times 2.3% of the Wanderer's Max HP, whichever is greater, until the crystal thorns are exhausted.
The HP loss ratio of the Crystamax thorns' Max HP is the same as the HP loss ratio of the Wanderer.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and summon Harrah to cast 12 thunderstorms, each of which deals damage equal to 229.2% of ATK plus 12 to nearby targets, during which the Wanderer has damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

Increase volt damage by 25% for 30 seconds after successfully using Harrah's Embrace. In addition, generate 3 Crystamax thorns (up to 5 can exist at one time). Crystamax thorns start with 100% Max HP, are unable to be attacked, can only be healed by Feedback, and last for 150 seconds.

Gain 2Feedbacks after Harrah's Embrace lands an attack (up to 4 Feedbacks can be stored). Lost Art consumes 1 Feedback every dodge attack, dealing damage to the target equal to the number of Crystamax thorns times 240% of ATK, recovering 25% of Max HP to the Crystamax thorns, and resetting Crystamax thorn location and duration.
Harrah's Embrace restores 1 dodge attempt upon landing an attack, and does not consume dodge attempts.

name: Liu Huo
weapon_description: "No violence please! Real academics wouldn't hit anyone with stationery!" —Rong Jin

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will ignite the target for 8 seconds, dealing damage equal to {3}% of ATK every second. While ignited, targets' healing effect is reduced by 50%.

Flame Resonance: Increase flame ATK by 20% and flame resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more flame weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Flame Resonance or Flame Reaction effects, with Flame Resonance taking precedence.

Fiery Explosion: On-Field: When landing any hit with Pine Comet, it deals damage to nearby targets equal to 105% of flame ATK plus 1.5% of the Wanderer's Max HP plus 55.0% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 200% of crit. This effect can be triggered once every 1.5 seconds. The Fiery Explosion damage is counted as normal attack damage. If there is 1 volt/frost/physical weapon of any kind equipped, Fiery Explosion damage is multiplied by 1.3 times. In addition, Fiery Explosion damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

When a Sparrow Feather hits a target, it triggers a spreading effect, dealing an additional area damage equal to 50% of the total burn and incendiary damage. It also spreads the affected target's Sparroburn to nearby targets, refreshing the Sparroburn duration. The spread effect can be triggered 1 time every 5 seconds.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.

When the Wanderer's HP is below 50% of Max HP, every 0.5 seconds, consume 1 Sparrow Feather and recover 1.5% of Max HP (increases to 3% of Max HP in solo play) until the Wanderer's HP is full or all Sparrow Feathers are consumed. This effect works in the off-hand slot.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

When receiving lethal damage, prevent lethal damage 1 time and gain damage immunity for a short duration, and instantly gain 60 Sparrow Feathers and 1000 weapon charge. Can be triggered 1 time every 60 seconds. This set effect works in the off-hand slot.
Increase flame damage by an additional 14.0% when you are under Pinnacle state.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 7 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 277% of ATK plus 15.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 232% of ATK plus 12.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 280% of ATK plus 15.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 277% of ATK plus 15.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 315% of ATK plus 17.
Sixth Attack: Deal damage equal to 718% of ATK plus 38.
Seventh Attack: Deal damage equal to 1199% of ATK plus 63.
While airborne, use normal attack to launch 7 consecutive attacks in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 264% of ATK plus 14.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 264% of ATK plus 14.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 215% of ATK plus 11.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 264% of ATK plus 14.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 309% of ATK plus 16.
Sixth Attack: Deal damage equal to 718% of ATK plus 38.
Seventh Attack: Deal damage equal to 1199% of ATK plus 63.
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the second to the fourth attack to trigger Freewriting.
Perform a spinning attack, dealing damage equal to 1220.9% of ATK plus 64 to nearby targets and knocking them back.
After triggering Freewriting, tap normal attack to trigger Elegant Strokes.
