Perform an arcing displacement, dealing damage equal to 143.6% of ATK plus 8 to nearby targets and suspending them.
After triggering Elegant Strokes, tap normal attack to trigger Falling Paper.
After triggering Falling Paper, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Elegant Strokes.
While on the ground, tap normal attack after triggering Elegant Strokes, or tap and hold normal attack when using the fifth to the seventh normal attack to trigger Falling Paper.

Kick the target into the air, dealing damage equal to 287.3% of ATK plus 15 to nearby targets and suspending them. Proceed to unleash a flaming bird to attack nearby targets, dealing damage up to 359.1% of ATK plus 19. Fall from above, dealing damage equal to 790% of ATK plus 42 to nearby targets and suspending them.
After triggering Falling Paper, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Elegant Strokes.
While airborne, tap and hold normal attack when using the second to sixth normal attacks to trigger Finishing Touch.
Erupt flames, dealing damage equal to 754.1% of ATK plus 40 to targets ahead.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne (tap when a target is available), or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetpack to trigger Fragmented Texts.
Fall from above, dealing damage equal to 395% of ATK plus 21 to surrounding targets upon reaching the ground and suspending them.
When dealing damage to the locked-on target using normal attacks, there is a 50% chance to gather Small Seal.
Flame: Gather flame power, dealing damage equal to 200% of ATK plus 11 to the target. Can be triggered no more than 1 time every 12 seconds.
Burst: Detonate flames, dealing damage equal to 50% of ATK plus 3 to nearby targets. Can be triggered no more than 1 time every 7 seconds.
Attract: Draw in nearby targets with intense flames, dealing damage equal to 200% of ATK plus 11. Can be triggered no more than 1 time every 15 seconds.
When the Wanderer has a Sparrow Feather:
Any attack using Pine Comet will launch a Sparrow Feather toward the locked-on target, dealing damage equal to 120% of ATK to nearby targets. Can be triggered 1 time every 1 second.
When Pine Comet is in the off-hand slot, attacking with any other weapons can also launch 1 Sparrow Feather to the locked-on target, which can be triggered 1 time every 2 seconds.
The initial number of Sparrow Feathers is 30, and a maximum of 60 can be stored at a time.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.
Passive: Gain 15 Sparrow Feathers.
Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Inkstone Droplet.
Splash ink, dealing damage equal to 603.3% of ATK plus 32 to nearby targets.

Passive: Inflict a 65% delay for 2 seconds on nearby targets (ineffective against bosses in team play), and form a line of flame to inflict a 50% slow effect on nearby targets, dealing damage equal to 120% of ATK plus 6 per second (this effect cannot be stacked when multiple flame lines/rings overlap). Lasts for 7 seconds.
When Inkstone Droplet is triggered, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Writing Artisan.
Splash ink, dealing damage equal to 1285.2% of ATK plus 68 to nearby targets.

Passive: Inflict a 65% delay for 2 seconds on nearby targets (ineffective against bosses in team play), and form a ring of flame to inflict a 50% slow effect on nearby targets, dealing damage equal to 120% of ATK plus 6 per second (this effect cannot be stacked when multiple flame lines/rings overlap). Lasts for 7 seconds.

Transform into multiple ink doppelgangers and become invincible for a short duration, dealing damage equal to 480.8% of ATK plus 25 to nearby targets. The ink then converges, drawing in nearby targets and releasing an ink attack, dealing damage up to 1169.3% of ATK plus 62. Cooldown: 25 seconds.

In All Directions gathers Calligraphy Characters on the field and uses the flaming bird transformation, dealing damage equal to (the number of summons plus Calligraphy Characters on the field, up to 8) times 531.6% of ATK to nearby targets. The Wanderer then enters the Pinnacle state, ignoring 30% of the target's flame resistance for 30 seconds.
The Pinnacle state provides different effects based on the type and quantity of the Calligraphy Characters gathered by In All Directions:
Gather 1 Discharge character "携" for a 16% discharge damage increase. Gather 2 Discharge characters "携" for a 20% shatter increase.
Gather 1 Skill character "技" for a 16% skill damage increase. Gather 2 Skill characters "技" to reduce the cooldown of In All Directions by 5 seconds.
Gather 1 Dodge character "闪" for a 20% dodge attack damage increase. Gather 2 Dodge characters "闪" to gain 3 dodge attempts.
Gather 1 Attack character "攻" for a 20% normal attack damage increase. Gather 2 Attack characters "攻" to gain a 5% damage reduction during normal attacks.
Every 1 Calligraphy Character gathered grants hyperbody for 2 seconds, up to a maximum of 16 seconds.
Passive: Calligraphy Characters
Using any weapon discharge/skill/dodge/normal attack will drop corresponding Calligraphy Characters.
Discharge: Drop 1 Discharge character "携" whenever using 1 discharge skill, up to a maximum of 2 Discharge characters "携" can exist on the field at a time.
Skill: Drop 1 Skill character "技" whenever using 1 skill, up to a maximum of 2 Skill characters "技" can exist on the field at a time.
Dodge: Drop 1 Dodge character "闪" whenever dodging for 2 times, up to a maximum of 2 Dodge characters "闪" can exist on the field at a time.
Attack: Drop 1 Attack character "攻" whenever using 4 normal attacks, up to a maximum of 2 Attack characters "攻" can exist on the field at a time.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and perform a forward sweep, dealing damage up to 2801% of ATK plus 147 to nearby targets and knocking them back. During the period, damage immunity lasts for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).
Passive: Sparroburn
When using any flame weapon's discharge skill, apply 1 stack of Sparroburn to the locked-on target, dealing damage equal to 100% of ATK per second for 15 seconds, stacking up to 2 stacks.

name: Yu Lan
weapon_description: Unity, in other words, consolidation. It's the weapon Ji Yu handpicked for Yu Lan, which possesses the latest tech from Domain 9. Please don't be surprised if you witness some miraculous sights after using it with the timestamp.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will strongly freeze targets for 2 seconds and leave them frostbitten for 6 seconds. Breaking the ice shell deals damage equal to {1}% of ATK. While frostbitten, the target's weapon charge rate is reduced by 50%.

Frost Resonance: Increase frost ATK by 20% and frost resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more frost weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Frost Resonance or Frost Reaction effects, with Frost Resonance taking precedence.

Icecrush: Swift Cut: When Unity is equipped, upon landing a hit with any weapon's discharge skill, deal initial damage to nearby targets equal to 30% of frost ATK plus 0.4% of the Wanderer's Max HP plus 15% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 55.0% of crit. While in combat, after every 0.5 seconds, the next Swift Cut damage will be increased by an additional 1 time, up to a maximum of 30 times. When multiple Swift Cut damages exist, the highest initial value is used for calculation. Swift Cut damage is counted as discharge skill damage. If there is 1 volt/physical/flame weapon of any kind equipped, Swift Cut damage is multiplied by 1.3 times. In addition, Swift Cut damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

While in the Martial Artist form, after consuming 3 or more Internal Strength, Unity restores 1 Internal Strength. Subsequently, the Wanderer's final damage is increased by 5%, and Unity's dodge attack/normal attack damage is increased by 50% for 30 seconds.
While in the Sweeping Force form, after consuming 3 or more Fighting Spirit, Unity restores 1 Fighting Spirit. Subsequently, the Wanderer's final damage is increased by 5% for 15 seconds.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
In the Martial Artist form, if Internal Strength is not obtained within 4 seconds, the next acquisition of Internal Strength will grant 2 counts.

In any form, when Unity consumes 3 or more Internal Strength or Fighting Spirit, restores 10% of the Wanderer's Max HP. In solo play, the HP recovery is increased to 20%. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 8 seconds in Sweeping Force form. In Martial Artist form, there are no limitations.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

After Unity consumes Internal Strength or Fighting Spirit, when receiving lethal damage, prevent lethal damage 1 time and recover 20% of the Wanderer's Max HP (Unavailable in Apex League). In solo play, the HP recovery is increased to 40%. Both effects can only trigger 1 time every 60 seconds.

While in the Martial Artist form, Unity's dodge attack / normal attack damage is further increased by 70%. After consuming Internal Strength, the Wanderer's final damage is increased by 10% for 30 seconds.
While in the Sweeping Force form, after Unity consumes Fighting Spirit, the Wanderer's final damage is increased by 15% for 30 seconds.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 6 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 132.2% of ATK plus 7 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 102.8% of ATK plus 5 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 107.7% of ATK plus 6 and knock the target back.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 293.7% of ATK plus 15 and knock the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 569.8% of ATK plus 30 and continuously knock the target back.
Sixth Attack: Deal damage equal to 464% of ATK plus 24 and launch the target.
Battering Fist can be used in either the Martial Artist or Sweeping Force form.
After using any dodge attack while in the Martial Artist form, use normal attack to quickly trigger the Fourth Attack.

After the Fifth Attack lands a hit while in the Martial Artist form, strongly freeze the target for 2 seconds (unavailable in Apex League and against bosses) and additionally inflict Chilblain, dealing damage equal to 270% of ATK plus 14 every second for 8 seconds. This effect can only be triggered on the same target 1 time every 8 seconds.
While airborne, use normal attack to launch 6 consecutive attacks in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 139.6% of ATK plus 7.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 122.2% of ATK plus 6.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 128% of ATK plus 7.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 278.3% of ATK plus 15.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 508.2% of ATK plus 27.
Sixth Attack: Deal damage equal to 453.7% of ATK plus 24.
Floating Fist can be used in either the Martial Artist or Sweeping Force form.
Forest-Piercing Swallow can only be used while in the Martial Artist form.
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the first to third normal attacks to trigger Forest-Piercing Swallow.
Deal damage equal to 128.3% of ATK plus 7 and draw in nearby targets. Then, deal damage equal to 299.3% of ATK plus 16 and knock the targets back.
After using Cloud-Soaring Kite, using normal attack can also trigger Forest-Piercing Swallow.
Sky-Dancing Snake can only be used while in the Martial Artist form.
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the fourth to fifth normal attacks to trigger Sky-Dancing Snake.
Deal damage equal to 153.9% of ATK plus 8 to nearby targets and suspend them.
After using Forest-Piercing Swallow, tapping and holding normal attack can also trigger Sky-Dancing Snake.
While airborne, tap and hold normal attack when using the first to sixth normal attacks to trigger Frost High & Low.
Toss your weapon in the air, dealing damage equal to 671.5% of ATK plus 35 to nearby targets.
Frost High & Low can be used in either the Martial Artist or Sweeping Force form.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne (tap when a target is available), or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetpack to trigger Cloud-Soaring Kite.
Fall from above, dealing damage equal to 303.2% of ATK plus 16 to nearby targets upon reaching the ground and knock them down.
Cloud-Soaring Kite can be used in either the Martial Artist or Sweeping Force form.
When on the ground, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Total Rewind.
Continuously draw in nearby targets while consuming endurance, during which the Wanderer gains hyperbody.
Total Rewind can be used in either the Martial Artist or Sweeping Force form.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.
Can be used in either the Martial Artist or Sweeping Force form.
After dodging while in the Martial Artist form, gain hyperbody for 5 seconds.
Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Impossible Feat, dealing damage equal to 362.5% of ATK plus 19 to nearby targets.
Impossible Feat can be used in either the Martial Artist or Sweeping Force form.
Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (tap an arrow button before dodging) to trigger Sweeping Clouds, dealing damage equal to 342% of ATK plus 18 to nearby targets.
Sweeping Clouds can be used in either the Martial Artist or Sweeping Force form.
Unity has 2 forms: Martial Artist and Sweeping Force. Activate up to 1 of them via the Skills - Settings page. They cannot be switched while in the combat state.

Martial Artist form: While in the combat state, Unity's dodge attack/normal attack multiplier is additionally increased by 40%. After using any weapon's dodge attack or normal attack 3 times, receive 1 Internal Strength (up to 10). Only 1 Internal Strength can be obtained every 2 seconds. While not in the combat state, all Internal Strength will be cleared.

Sweeping Force form: After Observe & React lands a hit, enter the Anticipate state and receive 1 Fighting Spirit every 0.8 seconds (up to 15) for 60 seconds. While not in the combat state, all Fighting Spirit will be cleared.
Passive: Chill
When Unity is equipped, ignore 30% of targets' Frost Resistance. This effect also works in the off-hand slot.

Deal damage equal to 2730% of ATK plus 144 to the target. Cooldown: 15 seconds. When using Fire in the Hole, Unity will consume up to 5 Internal Strength. When it consumes 1/2/3/4/5 Internal Strength, Fire in the Hole will deal 1.2/1.5/2.1/2.8/3.7 times of its original damage respectively.
After using Fire in the Hole, increase frost damage by 20% for 30 seconds.
After using Fire in the Hole, restore 2 dodge attempts.
Fire in the Hole can only be used while in the Martial Artist form.
When Internal Strength reaches 5, reset Fire in the Hole's cooldown.

Deal damage equal to 2730% of ATK plus 144 to the target. Cooldown: 15 seconds. While in the Anticipate state, when using any weapon skill, Unity will consume up to 5 Fighting Spirit. When it consumes 1/2/3/4/5 Fighting Spirit, deal additional area damage equal to 242%/503%/1,049%/2,351%/3,930% of ATK, and deal damage equal to 270% of ATK plus 14 every second for 5 seconds.
After using any frost weapon skill, gain 2 seconds of hyperbody.
Clashing of Arms can only be used while in the Sweeping Force form.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer, dealing damage up to 2394% of ATK plus 126 to nearby targets and strongly launching them. During this period, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).
Snow-Treading Tiger can only be used while in the Martial Artist form.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer, dealing damage equal to 2394% of ATK plus 126 to nearby targets and strongly launching them. During this period, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).
After Observe & React lands a hit, increase frost damage by 20% for 30 seconds.
After Observe & React lands a hit, enter the Anticipate state for 60 seconds.
After using Unity to use a discharge skill, receive 1,000 weapon charge. This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 10 seconds.
Observe & React can only be used while in the Sweeping Force form.

name: Ming Jing
weapon_description: An imposing and sharp greatsword that ordinary people can barely muster the strength to pick up. Its destructive power is juxtaposed by the wide blade and the sense of security it brings.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will cause enemies to become grievous for 7 seconds, increasing their damage received by 20% and dealing damage equal to {1}% of ATK. When in team play, physical damage dealt to grievous targets is increased by an additional 20%.

Physical Resonance: Increase physical ATK by 20% and physical resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more physical weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Physical Resonance or Physical Reaction effects, with Physical Resonance taking precedence.

Shield Break: Detachment: After using Absolute Ravine, every second, deal damage equal to 70% of physical ATK plus 1% of the Wanderer's Max HP plus 36% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 135% of crit for 30 seconds. Multiple Detachment damage will not stack and shield break damage will be counted as skill damage. If there is 1 volt/flame/frost weapon of any kind equipped, shield break damage is multiplied by 1.3 times. In addition, shield break damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.
Every time grievous is applied, deal devouring damage equal to 100% of ATK to the target. This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 0.5 seconds.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
After triggering Mighty Wind, turn targets hit into members of the Serpent Chain.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
After using Absolute Ravine, reduce the Wanderer's damage taken by 10% (20% in solo play) for 30 seconds.
When there is 1 Serpent Chain member, increase conduction damage's conduction rate by 80%.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
While the Xuanwu Totem is active, after Resistor's fifth attack lands its final hit, add 1 snake bite to the locked-on target.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 376% of ATK plus 20 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 533.6% of ATK plus 28 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 576% of ATK plus 30 and draw in enemies to the Wanderer.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 680% of ATK plus 36 and suspend the target.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 1080% of ATK plus 57 and launch the target.
While airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 attacks in a row in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 376% of ATK plus 20.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 560% of ATK plus 29.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 547.2% of ATK plus 29.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 467.2% of ATK plus 25.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 760% of ATK plus 40.
While using normal attack on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the first to fourth normal attacks to trigger Othershore Soul.
Toss your weapon ahead, dealing damage equal to 708% of ATK plus 37 to nearby targets.
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Collapsing Mountain.
Continuously move forward while attacking and consuming endurance, dealing damage equal to 800% of ATK plus 42 to nearby targets.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne (tap when a target is available), or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetpack to trigger In Continuity.
Dive down from above, dealing damage equal to 680% of ATK plus 36 to nearby targets upon reaching the ground.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.
Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (tap an arrow button before dodging) to trigger Open Clouds, dealing damage equal to 120% of ATK plus 6 to nearby targets.
While the Xuanwu Totem is active, after Open Clouds lands a hit, add 1 snake bite to the locked-on target.
Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Cutting Sand, unleashing a sword aura, dealing damage equal to 249.9% of ATK plus 13 to targets ahead.
While the Xuanwu Totem is active, after Cutting Sand lands a hit, add 1 snake bite to the locked-on target.
Tap and hold normal attack right after dodging to trigger Lookout (unavailable in Apex League).
After the Xuanwu Totem summoned by Absolute Ravine is completed, use Lookout to enter Selfless Realm for 25 seconds and gain 3 Dark Slashes.

After the first successful normal or dodge attack from Onyx Tortoise, it triggers Dark Slash. If the target is a common or elite enemy and their current HP doesn't exceed the Wanderer's base ATK by more than 350,000 times, the target will be immediately executed. Otherwise, deal damage equal to 3,000% of ATK.
Selfless Realm ends when its duration is over, the Dark Slash count is exhausted, or upon switching weapons. Selfless Realm can only be triggered 1 time every 200 seconds.

Split a crack in the ground ahead, and gain temporary invincibility (unavailable in Apex League) and draw in nearby targets, dealing damage equal to 2480% of ATK plus 131. Cooldown: 20 seconds. Increase the Wanderer's physical damage by 30% for 30 seconds, and then summon the Xuanwu Totem. The Xuanwu Totem is removed while in the non-combat state.

The Xuanwu Totem summons dark souls from the four formation cores every 0.6 seconds, each time dealing damage equal to 100% of ATK to targets along the way. When Absolute Ravine is in cooldown, gain the new skill Mirror Reflection: Strike back the nearby dark souls and activate their corresponding formation cores. After any formation core is activated, the Xuanwu Totem will be complete, and the Selfless Realm can be entered.
While the Xuanwu Totem is active, use Onyx Tortoise to gain hyperbody, and snake bites can be applied in the following ways:
After Absolute Ravine lands a hit, apply 1 snake bite to the target with the highest HP.
After Resistor's fifth attack lands its final hit, apply 1 snake bite to the locked-on target.
After Open Clouds lands a hit, apply 1 snake bite to the locked-on target.
After Cutting Sand lands a hit, add 1 snake bite to the locked-on target.
Snake bite deals devouring damage equal to 300% of ATK to the target, restores 12% of the Wanderer's Max HP, and makes the target a Serpent Chain member.

Serpent Chain can transfer 30% of the actual damage dealt by the Wanderer's main slot weapon to the locked-on Serpent Chain member and cause grievous to be conducted to all Serpent Chain members (including the target themselves). There can be up to 4 Serpent Chain members.

Conduction damage's element type follows the original damage and cannot be conducted again. The total conduction damage within 30 seconds should not exceed 14,000 times of the Wanderer's maximum ATK (unlimited in team play). Dark Slash damage cannot be conducted.

After using Absolute Ravine, the Wanderer can also trigger Mighty Wind: Serpent Chain members deal devouring damage equal to 35% of ATK to nearby targets (including the target themselves), and reset the devouring damage count.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and summon Xuanwu, dealing area damage equal to 2096% of ATK plus 110 to all nearby targets. During this period, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Huang
weapon_description:
A pair of fans that contains enormous energy capable of collapsing mountains and tearing the world apart.
When Azure Dragon mounts the clouds, the world is buffeted by the wind.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will strongly paralyze targets for 1 second and electrify them for 6 seconds, removing all their buffs and dealing damage equal to {1}% of ATK. Electrified targets can't receive any buffs for the next 6 seconds.

Volt Resonance: Increase volt ATK by 20% and volt resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more volt weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Volt Resonance or Volt Reaction effects, with Volt Resonance taking precedence.

Thunderboom: On-Field: When landing any hit with Azure Dragon, it deals damage to nearby targets equal to 131.3% of volt ATK plus 1.9% of the Wanderer's Max HP plus 68.8% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 250% of crit. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time every 1.5 seconds. The Thunderboom damage is counted as normal attack damage. If there is 1 flame/frost/physical weapon of any kind equipped, Thunderboom damage is multiplied by 1.3 times. In addition, Thunderboom damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.
Each time after Thunder Burst charges, 2 Azuras will appear. Each Azura will restore 20% Max HP to other summons.
Increase Thunder Burst's charged attack and shockwave damage by 50%.
After using Azure Moon, immediately gain 3 stacks of Qinglong's Might. Using other volt weapons' skills will grant 1 stack of Qinglong's Might instead.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
When Azure Dragon is equipped, reduce all volt weapon main skill cooldowns by 33%. This is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects.
Additionally, increase the Wanderer's volt damage by 30%. This effect works in the off-hand slot.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

When the Wanderer receives lethal damage, prevent lethal damage 1 time and gain damage immunity for a short duration. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 60 seconds and works in the off-hand slot.
After activating Fortitude Resonance:
Using Soaring Dragon draws in nearby targets, ignoring hyperbody (ineffective against bosses).

In team play, Thunder Burst will produce 1 volt timestamp every 6 seconds while charging, which will link up in the order they are produced to form a power grid. The power grid can block enemies' movements and their projectile damage. Each volt timestamp lasts for up to 20 seconds.
After using Azure Moon, increase the Wanderer's volt damage by 15% and final damage by 25% for 30 seconds.
While on the ground, use normal attack to attack 5 times in a row.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 184% of ATK plus 10.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 278% of ATK plus 15.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 808% of ATK plus 43.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 670% of ATK plus 35.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 334% of ATK plus 18.
While airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 attacks in a row in mid-air, consuming endurance.

Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 304% of ATK plus 16.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 835% of ATK plus 44.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 575% of ATK plus 30.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 373% of ATK plus 20.
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the first to fourth normal attacks to trigger Azure Dragon Pierces the Sun and consume endurance.
Launch an attack ahead, dealing damage equal to 666% of ATK plus 35 to nearby targets and suspending them.
After triggering Azure Dragon Pierces the Sun, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Thunder Burst.
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Thunder Burst.

Continuously fire lightning at targets, consuming endurance, during which the Wanderer gains hyperbody. Every attack that lands deals damage equal to 108% of ATK plus 6 to nearby targets. At the same time, summon 1 Azura every 1.5 seconds that fire shockwaves, dealing damage equal to 200% of ATK plus 11 to nearby targets.

Every time charged attack or shockwave lands a hit, reduce the target's volt resistance by 3%, up to 15% for 10 seconds. At the same time, the Wanderer gains a shield equal to 10% of Max HP every 1.5 seconds, stacking up to 30%, lasting for 15 seconds from the creation of the first shield.
After activating Fortitude Resonance:
Whenever Thunder Burst's shockwaves land a hit, nearby targets are taunted for 2 seconds.
Thunder Burst's volt resistance-lowering effect is changed to lowering all resistance instead.
Every time Thunder Burst produces a shield, nearby teammates will additionally receive a shield up to 10% of the Wanderer's Max HP.
While airborne, tap and hold normal attack when using the first to fourth normal attacks to trigger Roving Dragon and consume endurance.
Launch an attack ahead, dealing damage equal to 666% of ATK plus 35 to nearby targets and suspending them.
Every 3 normal attacks landed while using Azure Dragon grants 1 stack of Qinglong's Might, stacking up to 8 times, for 30 seconds.
After activating Fortitude Resonance:
Each stack of Qinglong's Might reduces the Wanderer's damage taken by 1.5%.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.
Passive: Launch a lightning ball ahead.
Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Lightning Flash.

Instantly appear at lightning ball's location, dealing damage equal to 215% of ATK plus 11 to nearby targets and produce a lightning pool, then return to the Wanderer's original location. The lightning pool will deal a total DoT equal to 302% of ATK plus 16 and continuously draw in nearby targets.
Passive: During Lightning Flash, the Wanderer receives hyperbody. After Lightning Flash lands a hit, receive 1 stack of Qinglong's Might.
After triggering Lightning Flash, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Thunder Burst.

An azure dragon soars through the sky. During this time, grant hyperbody to the Wanderer and deal damage equal to 3591% of ATK plus 189 to nearby targets. The azure dragon will circle for 8 seconds. During this time, continuously consume Qinglong's Might and summon up to 8 lightning strikes. Every lightning strike deals damage equal to 1313% of ATK plus 69 to nearby targets, and when the azure dragon disappears, deal damage again equal to 3000% of ATK plus 158 to nearby targets. Cooldown: 30 seconds and this cooldown cannot be lowered below 20 seconds. Azure Moon can accumulate up to 2 stacks of skill uses.
Passive: When 3 volt weapons are equipped, after Azure Moon lands a hit, deal skill damage equal to 600% of ATK to the target every 2 seconds for 30 seconds.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and gather chi. Then smash the ground, causing an explosion, dealing damage equal to 3060% of ATK plus 161 to nearby targets and suspending them. During the period, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

Passive: When Phantasia is triggered, if Azure Dragon is currently equipped or if switching to Azure Dragon from another weapon, deal damage equal to 20,000% of ATK to nearby targets. This damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects. This can only be triggered up to 1 time per Phantasia trigger.

name: Fei Se
weapon_description: Some flowers conceal a lethal intent.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will ignite the target for 8 seconds, dealing damage equal to {3}% of ATK every second. While ignited, targets' healing effect is reduced by 50%.

Flame Resonance: Increase flame ATK by 20% and flame resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more flame weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Flame Resonance or Flame Reaction effects, with Flame Resonance taking precedence.

Fiery Explosion: Swift Cut: When Endless Bloom is equipped, upon landing a hit with any weapon's discharge skill, deal initial damage to nearby targets equal to 37.5% of flame ATK plus 0.5% of the Wanderer's Max HP plus 18.8% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 68.8% of crit. While in combat, after every 0.5 seconds, the next Swift Cut damage will be increased by an additional 1 time, up to a maximum of 30 times. When multiple Swift Cut damages exist, the highest initial value is used for calculation. Fiery Explosion: Swift Cut damage is counted as discharge skill damage. If there is 1 frost/volt/physical weapon of any kind equipped, Fiery Explosion damage is multiplied by 1.3 times. In addition, Fiery Explosion damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

Blazing Heart damage's base multiplier is increased to 120% of ATK. While in the combat state, if the Wanderer inflicts multiple burn effects, Blazing Heart damage's base multiplier is additionally increased to that of the highest multiplier effect.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
The maximum number of Fei Se's Phantasia is increased to 2. After Whirling lands a hit, additionally create 1 Fei Se's Phantasia.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
For every 1 Fei Se's Phantasia or Lotus Petal in the Mirage, Blazing Heart's damage is additionally increased by 15%.
Lotus Aspara's endurance consumption is reduced by 75%.

Soulwear damage's base multiplier is increased to 900% of ATK, shatter is doubled, and there is a 15% chance to inflict a 65% delay for 2 seconds after landing a hit (ineffective against bosses in team play and unavailable in Apex League).
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 6 attacks in a row.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 136% of ATK plus 7 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 204% of ATK plus 11 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 220% of ATK plus 12 and knock the target down.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 240% of ATK plus 13 and suspend the target.

First Attack: Deal damage equal to 120% of ATK plus 6.

Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 288% of ATK plus 15.
