Roam between the mind and reality, creating 8 Heart Mirror Walls around the Wanderer (these count as summons) and deal damage equal to 2444% of ATK plus 129 to nearby targets. After using the skill, activate Poppa is Here for 15 seconds, gaining the ability to fly as well as improved movement speed and jumping capabilities. Normal attack now fires explosive shots that deal damage equal to 564% of ATK plus 30 to nearby targets upon hit and consumes endurance. After an explosive shot hits the ground, it will be transmitted to a Heart Mirror Wall and fired toward the locked-on target. Cooldown: 30 seconds. After Poppa is Here naturally ends, immediately gain 300 weapon charge.
During Poppa is Here, increase final damage according to the distance in height between the Wanderer and the target hit, up to 3%.
While in the combat state, when Poppa is Here is not in effect, Poppa will appear every 8 seconds and fire a Heavy Energy Round I dealing damage equal to 1,800% of ATK to nearby targets.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, remove debuffs from the Wanderer and activate the Satellite Ionic Beam upon switching to this weapon, summoning an ionic beam from the space station and dealing damage equal to 2951% of ATK plus 155 to nearby targets. At the same time, inflict Armor Dissolve on targets hit and gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).
After Extermination Protocol lands a hit, place 1 Mirror on both the target and the Wanderer for 45 seconds.
Mirror (Target): The damage dealt by the Wanderer will be reflected by Mirrors to other targets for an additional 15% damage.

Mirror (Self): Ignore 30% of the target's Flame Resistance (each element's total resistance ignored cannot exceed 50%). Whenever damage is taken, reflect 20% of the damage received (no more than 500% of the Wanderer's Max HP). This effect can be triggered up to 1 time every 3 seconds. During cooldown, after Poppa appears, she will admire her reflection in the mirror, reducing this effect's cooldown by 1 second.

name: Rei
weapon_description: The prototype bow specially built for Rei Ayanami by the Mirroria Department of Science and Technology. Refer to the appearance and color of EVA-00. Able to fire energy arrows.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack applies Force Impact on the enemy for 45 seconds, increasing their frost and volt damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). Force Impact replaces the target's grievous status, and targets with Force Impact cannot become grievous. Frost attacks will freeze targets with Force Impact for 2 seconds, and volt attacks will remove the buffs on targets with Force Impact. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

Fusion of Volt and Frost: When the weapon deals damage, damage is calculated using the highest equipped volt/frost base ATK, the highest equipped volt/frost ATK percentage, and the highest equipped volt/frost damage boost, and the weapon is considered both a volt and frost weapon.

Volt Resonance: Increase volt ATK by 20% and volt resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more volt weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Volt Resonance or Volt Reaction effects, with Volt Resonance taking precedence.

Frost Resonance: Increase frost ATK by 20% and frost resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more frost weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Frost Resonance or Frost Reaction effects, with Frost Resonance taking precedence.

Flash: Detachment: After using EVA-00 Lift-Off, deal damage equal to 1,000% of volt ATK plus 16% of Max HP plus 600% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 2,000% of crit to targets hit every second for 30 seconds. Multiple Detachment damage will not stack and Flash damage counts as skill damage. If any 1 physical or flame weapon is equipped, Flash damage is increased to 2.5 times. In addition, Flash damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

Homing Arrow: When using any weapon to deal damage, fire 1 Homing Arrow toward the targets, dealing damage equal to 400% of ATK to the first target hit. At the same time, receive 4 special energy. The Homing Arrow will remain on the target and increase their Overload for 30 seconds. When the number of Homing Arrows on a target reaches 3, the arrows will detonate, dealing damage equal to 1,300% of ATK to nearby targets. Homing Arrow can trigger up to 1 time every 0.5 seconds.
When Salvation is in the off-hand slot, increase Homing Arrow's detonation damage by 100%.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
Increase the volt damage dealt to targets with Homing Arrow: Overloaded by 10% and frost damage by 10%. This effect works in the off-hand slot.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
After using Mecha Strike, gain an additional 25 special energy.
After entering Energy Consumption, increase the Wanderer's volt damage by 16% and frost damage by 10% for 20 seconds.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 6 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 214% of ATK plus 11 and knock the target back a short distance.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 294% of ATK plus 15 and knock the target back a short distance.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 346% of ATK plus 18 and knock the target back a short distance.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage up to 320% of ATK plus 17 and knock the target back a short distance.

After the fifth attack, when a flashing light appears, tap to trigger the sixth attack. Sixth Attack: Fire a powerful energy arrow and release Homing Arrows that deal damage equal to 778% of ATK plus 41 to targets and apply a slowing magnetic field at the location of the first target hit for 3 seconds. Enemies within the area have their movement and attack speed reduced by 35%.
While airborne, use normal attack to launch 6 consecutive attacks in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 214% of ATK plus 11.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 294% of ATK plus 15.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 346% of ATK plus 18.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage up to 320% of ATK plus 17.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 666% of ATK plus 35.

After the fifth attack, when a flashing light appears, tap to trigger the sixth attack. Sixth Attack: Fire a powerful energy arrow and release 5 Homing Arrows that deal damage equal to 778% of ATK plus 41 to targets and apply a slowing magnetic field at the location of the first target hit. Enemies within the area have their movement and attack speed reduced by 40% for 3 seconds.
When using normal attack on the ground or in mid-air, while using the first to fifth normal attacks, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Backjump Arrow.
Fire a shot while jumping backward, dealing damage equal to 680% of ATK plus 36 to the target hit.
If special energy is greater than 70 at that time, trigger Energy Consumption: Increase volt ATK by 20% and frost ATK by 20%.
While Salvation is in the main slot, consume 5 special energy every 0.5 seconds. Increase Salvation's damage dealt by 30%. Continuously tap or tap and hold normal attack to trigger Dodging Rapidfire.
While Salvation is in the off-hand slot, consume 3.3 special energy every 0.5 seconds. Increase Homing Arrow's damage by 50% and increase its detonation radius.
The maximum amount of special energy is 100. When this amount is reached, switching Salvation from the main slot to the off-hand slot will immediately cause the Wanderer to enter Energy Consumption.
While in Energy Consumption, use normal attack to attack 3 times in a row.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 2301% of ATK plus 121.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 2199% of ATK plus 116.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 3600% of ATK plus 189.

Tap and hold normal attack to charge an attack. Deal damage equal to 80% of ATK plus 4. For every 0.1 seconds spent charging, the damage increases by 100%, reaching maximum damage after 2.3 seconds of charging.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.
Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Triple Shot, dealing damage equal to 135% of ATK plus 7 to the first target hit.

After dodging, tap normal attack at the appropriate time to trigger Charged Shots, firing out powerful energy arrows that deal damage equal to 322% of ATK plus 17 to targets. At the same time, fire Homing Arrows. The Wanderer receives 1 Blocking Barrier for 15 seconds, which blocks damage that does not exceed 10% of the Wanderer's Max HP. The Wanderer can only have up to 3 Blocking Barriers simultaneously.

Summon a mecha to pummel enemies, dealing damage equal to 2240% of ATK plus 118 to nearby targets. During this time, the Wanderer gains hyperbody and receives 35 special energy. Cooldown: 20 seconds. This is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer. Summon EVA-00 and use its shield to smash the ground, with the resulting shockwave dealing damage equal to 2970% of ATK plus 156 to nearby targets. Also, gain 30 special energy. During this period, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Nola
weapon_description: A motorcycle and a great sword. What a peculiar combination! But since she was never good at remembering names, she eventually decided to simply call both of them Rumble.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will mark the target, causing an explosion after 5 seconds. Additionally, inflict damage equal to 25% of all damage received by the target during the duration of the mark, up to a total of 560% of the Wanderer's ATK. Only 1 mark can exist on a target at a time.
Shifting: When 3 altered weapons are equipped, increase all elemental damage by 256%. This set effect works in the off-hand slot.
Elemental Engine: Rumble can actively switch its elemental type (while in the non-combat state). Go to the Skills > Settings page to switch elements.

Explosive Energy: On-Field: When Rumble lands any hit with normal attack, it deals damage equal to 3.6% of altered ATK plus 133% of the Wanderer's Max HP plus 4.9% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 1.3% of crit to nearby targets. This effect can trigger up to 1 time every 1.5 seconds. Explosive Energy damage is counted as normal attack damage. If there is 1 volt/frost/physical/flame weapon of any kind equipped, Explosive Energy damage is increased to {5} times. In addition, Explosive Energy damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.
Supersound's damage multiplier is increased to 60% of ATK.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.

Ignore 15% of the target's all resistance (each element's total resistance ignored cannot exceed 50%). When taking lethal damage, block the lethal damage 1 time and become immune to damage for a short period of time. This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 60 seconds. This effect works in the off-hand slot.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

After using Violent Energy, recover 6% Max HP every second for 10 seconds (unaffected by healing boost effects). After Superspeed Mode ends, this HP recovery effect will be removed. This effect works in the off-hand slot.
Increase final damage by 35%. This effect works in the off-hand slot.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 205% of ATK plus 11 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 372% of ATK plus 20 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 607% of ATK plus 32 and knock the target back.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage up to 1096% of ATK plus 58 and knock the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 726% of ATK plus 38 and launch the target.
In Superspeed Mode, during the Fifth Attack, tap and hold normal attack to chain it with the First Attack.
While airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 264% of ATK plus 14 and launch the target.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 87% of ATK plus 5 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 105% of ATK plus 6 and knock the target back.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage up to 392% of ATK plus 21 and knock the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 787% of ATK plus 41 and knock the target back.
Silent Slash: When enemies are hit during the Second and Third Attacks, trigger the Cut effect, extending attack duration and increasing damage.
When enemies are hit by the Second Attack, deal damage equal to 522% of ATK plus 27 and knock the target sback.
When enemies are hit by the Third Attack, deal damage equal to 420% of ATK plus 22 and knock the target back.
During Superspeed Mode, while using normal attack on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the first to second normal attacks to trigger Twin Slashes.
Deal damage equal to 544% of ATK plus 29 to nearby targets and knock the targets back.
During Superspeed Mode, when triggering Twin Slashes, continue to tap and hold normal attack to trigger Linked Slashes.

Deal damage equal to 776% of ATK plus 41 to nearby targets. At the same time, consume all Overload stacks and for every 1 stack consumed, additionally deal damage equal to 150% of ATK. If Overload is at 6 stacks, trigger Extreme Charge and deal damage equal to 1,000% of ATK.
While using normal attack on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the third to fourth normal attacks to trigger Whirlpool Rider.
Deal damage equal to 360% of ATK plus 19 to nearby targets.
While airborne, when using Cloud Riding, tap and hold normal attack (or tap when a target is available) to trigger the diving attack, Waterfall Rider.
Dive down from mid-air. During the course of landing, each hit on an enemy deals damage equal to 547% of ATK plus 29. After landing, deal damage equal to 547% of ATK plus 29 to nearby targets.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne, or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using a Jetpack to trigger the diving attack, Traveling Rider.
Dive down from mid-air. During the course of landing, each hit on an enemy deals damage equal to 240% of ATK plus 13. After landing, deal damage equal to 547% of ATK plus 29 to nearby targets.
Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (use a directional button before dodging) to trigger a pre-dodge attack, dealing damage up to 408% of ATK plus 21 to targets ahead.
Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger a post-dodge attack, dealing damage up to 410% of ATK plus 22 to targets ahead.

Dodge before holding to enter Sonic Skyrider during which speed is increased and endurance is constantly consumed to attack ahead. Every time the Wanderer lands a hit, deal damage equal to 90% of ATK plus 5 to nearby targets.

During Sonic Skyrider, jump and land to consume endurance and receive a temporary speed boost. In the Overworld, after entering Sonic Skyrider for 10 seconds, damage dealt by Sonic Skyrider can execute non-boss enemies (unavailable in Apex League).

Enter Superspeed Mode for the Wanderer to gain temporary invincibility and deal damage equal to 3480% of ATK plus 183 to nearby targets, and apply a 3-second 65% delay to the targets (ineffective against bosses in team play).

During Superspeed Mode, gain hyperbody, and at the same time, each attack of Windrider and Cloud Riding has Supersound, additionally dealing damage equal to 20% of ATK plus 1 (counts as passive damage). At the same time, each attack landed grants 1 stack of Overload, up to 6 stacks (up to 1 stack every 0.65 seconds).
After entering Superspeed Mode for 5 seconds, gain the new skill Flash Rider (can be used during Superspeed Mode). Switching weapons during this time will prevent the Wanderer from using Flash Rider.
Passive: Superspeed Reform
Rumble has 5 elemental types. Activate up to 1 of them via the Skills - Settings page. Unable to switch types while in combat.
Based on Rumble's elemental type, using Violent Energy to land a hit on a target will carry a different corresponding weapon trait and provide a different effect.

Frost-Volt: Receive 28 seconds of Superspeed Mode. During that time, every time Rumble lands a hit with normal attack or every time the Wanderer receives non-excess healing, receive 1 stack of Thermal Convergence, stacking up to 10 stacks. After Superspeed Mode has ended for 3 seconds, remove all Thermal Convergence that has not been transformed. Cooldown: 30 seconds (this is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects).

Flame-Physical: Receive 23 seconds of Superspeed Mode. When entering Superspeed Mode, consume all Sparks. For every stack consumed, receive 2,200 base flame ATK (this flame ATK will not be reflected on the Wanderer's stats and is unavailable in Apex League) and increase Rumble's final damage by 22%. During Superspeed Mode, gain Flame Pursuit. When dealing flame damage, deal damage equal to 1,520% of ATK to nearby targets, triggering up to 1 time every 2 seconds. Cooldown: 25 seconds (unaffected by cooldown resetting or reduction effects).

Volt-Frost: Receive 18 seconds of Superspeed Mode. During Superspeed Mode, increase volt damage by 30%. When landing a hit with normal attack while Rumble is in the main slot, receive 1 stack of Thunderclap, up to 18 stacks. At full stacks, consume all stacks and deal additional damage equal to 6,000% of ATK to nearby targets (counts as skill damage). At the same time, receive a 10-second Shield equal to 30% of Max HP (this effect does not stack). The Thunderclap additional effect can trigger up to 5 times each time the Wanderer enters Superspeed Mode. If Linked Slashes consumes 6 stacks of Overload, additionally deal damage equal to 11,000% of ATK to nearby targets. This damage counts as skill damage. Cooldown: 20 seconds (unaffected by cooldown resetting or reduction effects).

Physical-Flame: Receive 19 seconds of Superspeed Mode. During Superspeed Mode, deal damage equal to 2,900% of physical ATK to nearby targets every second. Every time this damage hits a target, it grants the Wanderer a 10-second Shield equal to 5% of Max HP, up to 10% being added at a time. This Shield's maximum will not exceed 50% of the Wanderer's HP. Cooldown: 21 seconds (unaffected by cooldown resetting or reduction effects).

Altered: Receive 23 seconds of Superspeed Mode. During Superspeed Mode, increase Max HP by 100%. At the same time, each attack landed by Windrider and Cloud Riding additionally deals damage equal to 1,400% of Max HP, not exceeding 240 times of the Wanderer's ATK. This damage counts as skill damage and is unaffected by damage-boosting effects. Cooldown: 25 seconds (unaffected by cooldown resetting or reduction effects).
Can be triggered during Superspeed Mode to deal multiple-phased linked slashes to nearby targets, dealing damage totalling to 1600% of ATK plus 84. Superspeed Mode ends after using this skill.
Passive: Superspeed Inertia
Based on Rumble's element, use Flash Rider to provide an additional effect.

Frost-Volt: Consume all Thermal Convergence stacks and gain Deepfreeze, which increases frost damage boost by 1.4% of Thermal Convergence stack count. At the same time, deal frost damage equal to 1,400% of ATK plus Thermal Convergence stack count times 240% of ATK to nearby targets. This damage counts as passive damage and lasts for 30 seconds.

Altered: Deal damage equal to 50,000% of the Wanderer's Max HP to nearby targets. This damage does not exceed 8,000 times of the Wanderer's ATK, counts as skill damage, and is unaffected by damage-boosting effects.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and deal damage equal to 3200% of ATK plus 168 to nearby targets. During this period, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Meryl Ironheart
weapon_description: Developed by Hykros, this transformable weapon boasts remarkable design and performance, though it's hard to mass-produce due to its complexity. "One strike is all it takes to breach a fortress."—commented its designer.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack applies Force Impact on the enemy for 45 seconds, increasing their frost and volt damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). Force Impact replaces the target's grievous status, and targets with Force Impact cannot become grievous. Frost attacks will freeze targets with Force Impact for 2 seconds, and volt attacks will remove the buffs on targets with Force Impact. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

Fusion of Volt and Frost: When the weapon deals damage, damage is calculated using the highest equipped volt/frost base ATK, the highest equipped volt/frost ATK percentage, and the highest equipped volt/frost damage boost, and the weapon is considered both a volt and frost weapon.

Volt Resonance: Increase volt ATK by 20% and volt resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more volt weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Volt Resonance or Volt Reaction effects, with Volt Resonance taking precedence.

Frost Resonance: Increase frost ATK by 20% and frost resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more frost weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Frost Resonance or Frost Reaction effects, with Frost Resonance taking precedence.

Electroblade: Swift Cut: When equipped with Siege Edge, weapon discharge skills deal damage equal to 1.0% of Max HP plus 73.2% of volt ATK plus 36.6% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 134.3% of crit to nearby targets. While in combat, after every 0.5 seconds, the next Swift Cut damage will be increased by an additional 1 time, up to a maximum of 30 times. When multiple Swift Cut damages exist, the highest initial value is used for calculation. Swift Cut damage counts as discharge damage. If any physical or flame weapon is equipped, volt damage is multiplied by 2.5. In addition, volt damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

Sensory Transformation: When attacking with Siege Edge equipped, it has greatsword and longsword forms. Greatsword form attacks provide a shield equal to 2% of Max HP, lasting for 5 seconds and stacking up to 5 times. Longsword form attacks provide Electroblade stacks; upon 5 stacks, gain Electroblade Enhancement, increasing damage of the next skill by 100%. Electroblade and Electroblade Enhancement are cleared after exiting battle.

When Siege Edge is in the main slot, Chain Static has a 25% chance to trigger Magnetic Tempest, dealing 2,000% of ATK as damage (this is counted as skill damage). This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 2 seconds.
When Siege Edge is switched to the off-hand slot when in the Electromagnetic Disruption state, triggers a charge effect that lasts for 4 seconds, granting 100 weapon charge every second.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.

Any volt weapon skill or discharge, Solar Shot, Step-Back Shot, and Magnetoelectric Artillery can give special energy. When fully charged, using Magnetic Ray Cannon will consume all special energy and enhance Electromagnetic Disruption: Chance of triggering Chain Static and Magnetic Tempest is increased to 100%.
Gives full special energy upon entering combat state.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
Increase final damage by 30%. This effect also works in the off-hand slot.
In enhanced Electromagnetic Disruption state, increase damage multiplier of Chain Static and Magnetic Tempest by 100%.

When Fortitude Resonance is triggered, using Cosmic Thunder while Electroblade Enhancement is in effect provides the user and nearby teammates with 20% damage reduction that lasts for 20 seconds and a shield equal to 20% of the user's Max HP that lasts for 20 seconds.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 1360% of ATK plus 72 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 3060% of ATK plus 161 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 4930% of ATK plus 259 and knock the target back.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage up to 3931% of ATK plus 207 and knock the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 5868% of ATK plus 309 and knock the target back.
While the Wanderer is airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks in the air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 800% of ATK plus 42 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 1600% of ATK plus 84 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 1766% of ATK plus 93 and knock the target back.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage up to 1968% of ATK plus 104 and knock the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 2234% of ATK plus 118 and knock the target back.
While using normal attack on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the first or second normal attacks to trigger Thunderous Cutter.
Swing Siege Edge and perform downward slashes in front, dealing damage equal to 1932% of ATK plus 102 to nearby targets.
While using normal attack on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the third to fourth normal attacks to trigger Lightning Thrust.
Perform a swift upward attack, dealing damage equal to 1600% of ATK plus 84 to nearby targets.
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Solar Shot.
Fire a charged shot at the target, dealing damage equal to 1266% of ATK plus 67 to the target upon hit.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne (tap when a target is available), or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using a Jetpack to trigger Electrified Flicker.
Fall down from mid-air. During the course of landing, each hit on an enemy deals damage equal to 250% of ATK plus 13. After landing, deal damage equal to 250% of ATK plus 13 to nearby targets.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.
Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (use a directional button before dodging) to trigger Pulsing Whirl, dealing damage up to 484% of ATK plus 25 to targets ahead.
Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Step-Back Shot, dealing damage equal to 350% of ATK plus 18 to the hit target.

Tap and hold normal attack right after dodging to trigger Magnetoelectric Artillery, which has three strengths according to the length of time charged: deal damage equal to 465% of ATK plus 24, 1015% of ATK plus 53, or 1815% of ATK plus 96 to targets ahead. Max charge can execute non-boss targets (other than Wanderers) with up to 30% of Max HP remaining.

Switch Siege Edge to longsword form, dealing damage equal to 10850% of ATK plus 571 (this does not accumulate Electroblade). This skill has a cooldown of 20 seconds (this is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects).

When Fortitude Resonance is triggered: Using Cosmic Thunder provides nearby teammates with hyperbody for 10 seconds; while Electroblade Enhancement is in effect, using Cosmic Thunder pulls in nearby enemies and inflicts them with resistance reduction of 20% for 20 seconds.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer. Siege Edge changes to EM Blaster form and unleashes a powerful blast, dealing damage equal to 12000% of ATK plus 632 to targets ahead. When unleashing this blast, immune to damage for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

After using Magnetic Ray Cannon, increase the Wanderer's volt attack by 20% for 20 seconds and enter Electromagnetic Disruption for 22 seconds: During this time, the Wanderer gains hyperbody; using any volt weapon skill gives an additional 500 weapon charge; volt damage has a 25% chance to trigger Chain Static, dealing damage equal to 200% of ATK to up to 7 targets (this is counted as normal attack damage but does not trigger normal attack effects), and this effect can be triggered up to 1 time every 0.5 seconds; defeating a target triggers Chain Static again, and this effect can be triggered up to 1 time every 0.1 seconds.
When Fortitude Resonance is triggered:
In Electromagnetic Disruption state, taunt nearby enemies every 2 seconds and provide the Wanderer with a shield equal to 20% of Max HP that lasts for 2 seconds.
When Fortitude Resonance is not triggered:
In Electromagnetic Disruption state, Siege Edge attacks inflict Static to targets upon hit, reducing their speed by 30% for 20 seconds.

name: Asurada
weapon_description: You commit evil deeds, sow bad seeds, and reap the consequences—naturally, you should be devoured by karmic fire... Haha, pretty cool, right? Oh, I hit you because... I didn't sleep well last night. Yeah, yeah, a crazy person like me should burn in karmic fire... but not today.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack inflicts Armor Dissolve on the target for 45 seconds, increasing their flame and physical damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). This effect will replace the grievous status on the target, and targets with this effect cannot become grievous. Physical attacks will stun targets under the dissolve effect for 2 seconds, and flame attacks will decrease the targets' speed by 50% for 5 seconds. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

Fusion of Mass and Flame: When the weapon deals damage, damage is calculated using the highest equipped physical/flame base ATK, the highest equipped physical/flame ATK percentage, and the highest equipped physical/flame damage boost, and the weapon is considered both a physical and flame weapon.

Physical Resonance: Increase physical ATK by 20% and physical resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more physical weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Physical Resonance or Physical Reaction effects, with Physical Resonance taking precedence.

Flame Resonance: Increase flame ATK by 20% and flame resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more flame weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Flame Resonance or Flame Reaction effects, with Flame Resonance taking precedence.

Blaze: On-Field: When hitting any target with Hellfire, deal damage equal to 256% of flame ATK plus 3.6% of Max HP plus 133% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 4.9% of crit to nearby targets. Can be triggered up to 1 time every 1.5 seconds. Blaze damage counts as normal attack damage. If any 1 frost or volt weapon is equipped, Blaze damage is multiplied by 1.3. In addition, Blaze damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.
Increase coordinated attack damage of Role Play to 100% of the damage dealt by the attack.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
For every 1 Afterimage on the field, increase the damage of Unstoppable Momentum by 10%. If there are 5 Afterimages on the field, increase the damage of Unstoppable Momentum to 100%.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
For every Afterimage consumed by triggering Unstoppable Momentum, provide the Wanderer with a shield equal to 6% of Max HP for 30 seconds, up to 60%.
Increase final damage boost provided by Flame Soul to 33%.
While on the ground, use normal attack to attack 5 times in a row.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 210% of ATK plus 11.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 392% of ATK plus 21.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 752% of ATK plus 40.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 1065% of ATK plus 56.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 1131% of ATK plus 60.
While airborne, use normal attack to attack 4 times in a row in the air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 180% of ATK plus 9.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 336% of ATK plus 18.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 567% of ATK plus 30.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 1340% of ATK plus 71.

While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the first to third normal attacks to spin ahead a short distance, dealing damage equal to 560% of ATK plus 29 and entering Anticipation state:

While in Anticipation state, release normal attack to trigger Rising Slash, dealing damage equal to 287% of ATK plus 15 to nearby targets and suspending targets midair as the Wanderer leaps into the air. After triggering Rising Slash, tap normal attack again to trigger Heavenly Fire.

After 1.2 seconds in Anticipation state, continue holding normal attack to trigger Turbulence, each slash consuming endurance and dealing damage equal to 114% of ATK plus 6 to nearby targets, spreading 25% of Turbulence's damage among targets when multiple are hit (damage is not spread if over 5 targets). During Turbulence, release normal attack to trigger Cross Slash, dealing damage equal to 665% of ATK plus 35 to nearby targets.
While airborne, tap and hold normal attack when using the first to third normal attacks to trigger Executioner's Judgement.
Quickly land on the ground, dealing damage equal to 430% of ATK plus 23 to nearby targets.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.

Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (tap an arrow button before dodging) to trigger Phantom Under the Blade, dealing damage equal to 503% of ATK plus 26 to targets ahead. Hold normal attack instead of tapping it to also trigger Scorch the Land after Phantom Under the Blade.

Use normal attack right after dodging backward to trigger Walking Through Fire, shooting forward 2 sword auras that deal damage equal to 675% of ATK plus 36. After triggering Walking Through Fire, tap normal attack to trigger the third attack of Burning Sacrifice.
Tap dodge twice to quickly dash forward, dealing damage equal to 900% of ATK plus 47 to targets ahead.

When in the Role Play state, Fanning the Flames is replaced with Up to the Skies: Quickly leap high into the air and draw in nearby targets, dealing damage equal to 1065% of ATK plus 56 and suspending the targets in air, while all Afterimages also trigger Unstoppable Momentum once. After triggering Up to the Skies, tap normal attack to trigger Falling Star Impact: Quickly land on the ground and deal damage equal to 1131% of ATK plus 60 to nearby targets, while all Afterimages also trigger Unstoppable Momentum once.

(DMG from the skill's effect and debuff triggered counts as normal attack damage.) While on the ground, hold dodge to start charging and release to trigger Unstoppable Momentum, dashing forward and dealing damage equal to 1065% of ATK plus 56 to targets ahead. When using Unstoppable Momentum, every Afterimage on the field will unleash an additional Unstoppable Momentum attack toward the Wanderer, after which the Afterimages will quickly disappear. If the target is killed, duration of the Afterimage is reset and it can affect the next Unstoppable Momentum.

Enter Flame Soul state, increasing final damage by 18% for 25 seconds. The Wanderer moves back, throws their weapon, and summons flame phantom slashes, dealing damage equal to 2250% of ATK plus 118 to nearby targets. After the phantoms combine, the Wanderer dashes forward and attacks with the flame phantoms, dealing damage equal to 1200% of ATK plus 63 to nearby targets and launching them into the air. This has a cooldown of 25 seconds. The Wanderer also enters Role Play state for 21 seconds.

Role Play: In this state, the Wanderer gains hyperbody; when normal attack or dodge attack (excluding attacks that trigger Unstoppable Momentum) hits a target, the Wanderer generates an Afterimage that can perform a coordinate attack, dealing damage equal to 50% of the current attack's damage. Afterimages last for 30 seconds, with up to 5 able to exist on the field at any given time. Afterimages count as summons.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and quickly charge an attack with three swords. After charging, perform a flurry of slashes in front, dealing damage equal to 3170% of ATK plus 167 to all nearby targets and reducing the healing received of hit targets by 60% for 30 seconds. During this period, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Gray Fox
weapon_description: An Omnium weapon modeled after an item in Witch of Time.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack applies Force Impact on the enemy for 45 seconds, increasing their frost and volt damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). Force Impact replaces the target's grievous status, and targets with Force Impact cannot become grievous. Frost attacks will freeze targets with Force Impact for 2 seconds, and volt attacks will remove the buffs on targets with Force Impact. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

Fusion of Frost and Volt: When the weapon deals damage, damage is calculated using the highest equipped frost/volt base ATK, the highest equipped frost/volt ATK percentage, and the highest equipped frost/volt damage boost, and the weapon is considered both a frost and volt weapon.

Frost Resonance: Increase frost ATK by 20% and frost resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more frost weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Frost Resonance or Frost Reaction effects, with Frost Resonance taking precedence.

Volt Resonance: Increase volt ATK by 20% and volt resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more volt weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Volt Resonance or Volt Reaction effects, with Volt Resonance taking precedence.

Chrono Coil: Release: After using Magic Transmutation, deal damage equal to 137% of frost ATK plus 19.5% of the Wanderer's Max HP plus 70% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 264% of crit to targets hit every second for 30 seconds. Release damage does not stack and Chrono Coil damage is counted as skill damage. If there is 1 flame/physical weapon of any kind equipped, Chrono Coil damage is multiplied by 1.3 times. In addition, Chrono Coil damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

Mana Reserve: When The Witch's Key is in the main slot, can gain Power Scale to advance the clock progress of The Witch's Key, enhancing magic effects or releasing more powerful magic. Power Scale can stack up to 12 times, lasting for 60 seconds, and will be removed 15 seconds after exiting battle.
Under the Witch of Time state and when The Witch's Key is in the main slot, gain an additional 1 stack of Power Scale every 1 seconds.

After using Magic Transmutation, apply an additional Reverse Tide effect to the hit target for 12 seconds, stacking up to 1 time. While Reverse Tide is active, the Wanderer recovers HP equal to the number of nearby targets affected by Reverse Tide times 80% of ATK every 1 seconds.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
Under the Witch of Time state, deal 3,100% of ATK as DMG to nearby targets every 1 seconds.

When Benediction Resonance is active: Upon using Magic Transmutation at full Power Scale stacks, increase final damage of the Wanderer and nearby teammates by 25% for 30 seconds (this effect does not stack); in addition, targets affected by Reverse Tide will have their crit resistance reduced by 2% every 2 seconds for 10 seconds, up to 5 stacks.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

Increase healing by 15%. For every 12 Power Scale stacks consumed, gain 1 stack of Exemption Privilege: When taking lethal damage, consume 1 stack to prevent the lethal effect and recover 15% of Max HP, stacking up to 4 times (unavailable in Apex League).
When Benediction Resonance is active: Exemption Privilege can be additionally granted to nearby teammates.
Upon entering the Witch of Time state, the frost elemental damage boost increases to 2.5% for every 1 Power Scale stack consumed.

When Reverse Tide ends, deal additional damage equal to 50% of the total damage taken during this period to the target (does not exceed the Wanderer's ATK times 1000 in solo mode and the Wanderer's ATK times 15000 in team mode). Damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 4 attacks in a row.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 1078% of ATK plus 57 and knock the target back, gaining 1 Power Scale stack.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 1494% of ATK plus 79 and knock the target back, gaining 1 Power Scale stack.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 1543% of ATK plus 81 and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to up to 2376% of ATK plus 125 to the target and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.

Each hit of Magic Unleashed adds 1 Temporal Fallacy stack to the target, decreasing all attack of the target by 3% for 10 seconds, stacking up to 4 times (this decrease will not be reflected on the Wanderer's stats).
While the Wanderer is airborne, use normal attack to launch 4 consecutive attacks, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 1078% of ATK plus 57 and knock the target back, gaining 1 Power Scale stack.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 1494% of ATK plus 79 and knock the target back, gaining 1 Power Scale stack.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 1543% of ATK plus 81 and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to up to 2376% of ATK plus 125 to the target and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.

Each hit of Aerial Waltz adds 1 Temporal Fallacy stack to the target, decreasing all attack of the target by 3% for 10 seconds, stacking up to 4 times (this decrease will not be reflected on the Wanderer's stats).
While using normal attack on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the third to fourth normal attacks to trigger Fated Wheel.
Deal damage equal to 4000% of ATK plus 211 to nearby targets and knock the targets back.

After Fated Wheel hits, enhances Temporal Fallacy to decrease all attack of the target by 5% (this decrease is not reflected on the Wanderer's stats) and also inflict a 10% Slow effect for 10 seconds.
Under the Witch of Time state, while on the ground, use normal attack to launch 4 consecutive attacks, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 1232% of ATK plus 65 and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 1809% of ATK plus 95 and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 2425% of ATK plus 128 and draw in the target, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to up to 8292% of ATK plus 436 to the target and launch the target, gaining 3 Power Scale stacks.
Under the Witch of Time state, use normal attack to launch 4 consecutive attacks, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 1232% of ATK plus 65 and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 1809% of ATK plus 95 and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 2425% of ATK plus 128 and draw in the target, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to up to 8292% of ATK plus 436 to the target and launch the target, gaining 3 Power Scale stacks.

When under the Witch of Time state and with 12 Power Scale stacks, tap and hold normal attack or hold during normal attack on the ground to consume all Power Scale stacks and trigger Stagnant Stream, dealing damage equal to 8379% of ATK plus 441 to nearby targets.
When Benediction Resonance is active:

Nearby teammates recover all HP lost in the past 3.5 seconds and additional HP equal to 200% of ATK. Also remove debuffs and control effects (including Graying Bite effect) from the Wanderer and nearby teammates.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne, or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetpack to trigger Divebomb.
While falling, deal damage equal to 1225% of ATK plus 64 each hit. After landing, deal damage equal to 2822% of ATK plus 149 to nearby targets.
Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (use a directional button before dodging) to trigger a pre-dodge attack, dealing damage up to 2499% of ATK plus 132 to targets ahead.
Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger a post-dodge attack, dealing damage up to 2401% of ATK plus 126 to targets ahead.
Hold dodge to enter Airborne Fantasy, increasing speed and continuously consuming endurance. Upon ending Airborne Fantasy, deal up to damage equal to 3430% of ATK plus 181 to targets ahead.
Consume all Power Scale stacks to deal damage equal to 8371% of ATK plus 441 to nearby targets.

Enter the Witch of Time state, in which some normal attack modes change and the Wanderer increases frost damage by 2% for 30 seconds for each Power Scale stack consumed. While in this state, using Stagnant Stream grants a new skill, Sub-Zero Beam (only can be obtained and used 1 time in each Witch of Time state, and switching weapons during this state will prevent obtaining or using it). Cooldown of 30 seconds. (This is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects.)

Can be used while in the Witch of Time state, dealing damage equal to 5043% of ATK plus 265 to nearby targets and freezing them for 2 seconds. Also recover HP equal to 400% of ATK for nearby teammates and gain 12 Power Scale stacks.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer, gain 12 Power Scale stacks, and gain Hyperbody for 30 seconds, dealing damage equal to 18000% of ATK plus 947 to nearby targets. During this period, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).
When Benediction Resonance is active:
Remove debuffs and control effects (including Graying Bite) from the Wanderer and nearby teammates.

name: Claudia Storm Eye
weapon_description: Twin weapons crafted for agile and mobile combat, exceptional in both quality and weight. "Bullets pierce shadows, blades carve the night"—a reflection of the wielder's burning resolve.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack inflicts Armor Dissolve on the target for 45 seconds, increasing their flame and physical damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). This effect will replace the grievous status on the target, and targets with this effect cannot become grievous. Physical attacks will stun targets under the dissolve effect for 2 seconds, and flame attacks will decrease the targets' speed by 50% for 5 seconds. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

Fusion of Mass and Flame: When the weapon deals damage, damage is calculated using the highest equipped physical/flame base ATK, the highest equipped physical/flame ATK percentage, and the highest equipped physical/flame damage boost, and the weapon is considered both a physical and flame weapon.

Physical Resonance: Increase physical ATK by 20% and physical resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more physical weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Physical Resonance or Physical Reaction effects, with Physical Resonance taking precedence.

Flame Resonance: Increase flame ATK by 20% and flame resistance by 40%. Activate by equipping 2 or more flame weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Flame Resonance or Flame Reaction effects, with Flame Resonance taking precedence.

Scarlet Blade: Swift Cut: When Scarlet Gale is equipped, any weapon's discharge skill will deal damage equal to 73.2% of physical ATK plus 1% of Max HP plus 36.6% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 134.3% of crit to nearby targets. While in combat, after every 0.5 seconds, the next Swift Cut damage will be increased by an additional 1 time, up to a maximum of 30 times. When multiple Swift Cut damages exist, the highest initial value is used for calculation. Swift Cut damage is counted as discharge skill damage. If there is 1 frost/volt weapon of any kind equipped, Scarlet Blade damage is increased to 2.5 times. In addition, Scarlet Blade damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

When Scarlet Gale is equipped in the main slot and the Wanderer takes lethal damage, performs Swift Lightning, during which the Wanderer is immune to damage. The minimum trigger interval is 20 seconds.
Blade of Unity is triggered at 5, 10, and 15 seconds.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
When Blade of Unity hits a target, apply Suppress effect for 4 seconds, decreasing the target's movement speed by 20% and dealing damage equal to 480% of ATK every second.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
When Blade of Unity is triggered, recover 25% of HP. If current HP is less than 50% of max HP, increase recovery to 50% (unaffected by healing bonus effects and unavailable in Apex League).
Increase physical damage boost from Radiant Halo to 40% for 30 seconds.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 327% of ATK plus 17 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 693% of ATK plus 36 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 941% of ATK plus 50 and knock the target back.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage up to 1265% of ATK plus 67 and knock the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 1343% of ATK plus 71 and knock the target back.
While the Wanderer is airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks in the air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 327% of ATK plus 17 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 693% of ATK plus 36 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 941% of ATK plus 50 and knock the target back.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage up to 1265% of ATK plus 67 and knock the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 1343% of ATK plus 71 and knock the target back.
While using normal attack on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the first to fourth normal attacks to trigger Furious Flurry.
Swing Scarlet Gale, dealing damage equal to 1238% of ATK plus 65 to nearby targets.
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Gust Hunter.
Fire a shot at the target, dealing damage equal to 314% of ATK plus 17 to the target upon hit.
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne (tap when a target is available), or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using a Jetpack to trigger Thousand-Ton Slam.
Fall down from mid-air. During the course of landing, each hit on an enemy deals damage equal to 743% of ATK plus 39. After landing, deal damage equal to 743% of ATK plus 39 to nearby targets.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.
Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (use a directional button before dodging) to trigger Glimmering Kick, dealing damage equal to 891% of ATK plus 47 to targets ahead.
Become invincible for a short duration during Glimmering Kick.
Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Hail of Shadows, dealing damage equal to 583% of ATK plus 31 to the hit target.
Tap and hold normal attack right after dodging to trigger Unseen Shadows, dealing damage equal to 1166% of ATK plus 61 to targets ahead.
Deal damage equal to 4301% of ATK plus 226 to nearby targets. Cooldown of 21 seconds (this is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects).

After using Radiant Halo, increase physical damage by 25% for 30 seconds. Blade of Unity is triggered 6 seconds and 12 seconds after using Radiant Halo, dealing area damage equal to 13,000% of ATK to the selected target.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and deal damage equal to 4465% of ATK plus 235 to targets ahead. During this period, gain damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Nemesis Voidpiercer
weapon_description: Shattered... Voidpiercer...

description.paragraph: None
Elemental Tuning: When equipped with Star of Oblivion, if the elements of the other two weapons match, Star of Oblivion's element adopts the same element. Otherwise, it shifts to the altered element.
Chaotic Wave: Three altered weapons reduce the hit enemies' final damage by 15% for 5 seconds.

Eternal Shadow: Unload: After using Starfall Cleave, deal damage equal to 256% of altered ATK plus 3.6% of the Wanderer's Max HP plus 133% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 4.9% of crit to targets hit every second for 30 seconds. Multiple Unload damage cannot be stacked. Eternal Shadow damage counts as skill damage. If there is 1 physical/flame/frost/volt weapon of any kind equipped, Eternal Shadow damage is multiplied by 1.3 times. In addition, Eternal Shadow damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.
Normal Attack: Pursuit's damage doubles, inflicting a brief 70% Slow effect on hit.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.

During Dark Star, the Wanderer will ignore 30% of the target's resistance (each element's total resistance ignored cannot exceed 50%). Upon entering the combat state, switching to Star of Oblivion for the first time allows using Void Annihilation without charge cost.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

When the Dark Star is triggered, the Wanderer obtains a shield equal to 60% of Max HP. This shield can stack with other shields, but the total shield value cannot exceed 100% of Max HP. Any excess will be converted to equivalent healing.
Increase final damage by 16%, all elemental damage boosted by 16%. This set effect works in the off-hand slot.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 562% of ATK plus 30, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 1810% of ATK plus 95, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 832% of ATK plus 44, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 2413% of ATK plus 127, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 2460% of ATK plus 129, inflicting 3 stacks of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.

When a Pursuit Prey target is present, use normal attack to trigger Pursuit, diving near the target and dealing damage equal to 1778% of ATK plus 94. On hit, grant 1 stack of Frenzy, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered. Pursuit can be triggered up to 1 time every 4.5 seconds.
While airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 562% of ATK plus 30, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 1810% of ATK plus 95, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 832% of ATK plus 44, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 2413% of ATK plus 127, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 2460% of ATK plus 129, inflicting 3 stacks of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.

When a Pursuit Prey target is present, use normal attack to trigger Pursuit, diving near the target and dealing damage equal to 1778% of ATK plus 94. On hit, grant 1 stack of Frenzy, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered. Pursuit can be triggered up to 1 time every 4.5 seconds.

Tap and hold normal attack or hold during the first to third normal attack on the ground to backflip and trigger Star of Oblivion, hitting up to 2 times. Each hit deals damage equal to 915% of ATK plus 48 to the target and fires bullets that deal damage equal to 686% of ATK plus 36, marking locked-on targets with Pursuit Prey.
When Dark Star: Chaos is triggered, Chase of Nought inflicts 1 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets.

When Frenzy reaches 3 stacks, Chase of Nought is replaced with Dimensional Seal. Tap and hold normal attack to teleport in front of the locked-on target, capturing its afterimage into a Black Hole (immune to damage from target during Dimensional Seal), and triggering an explosion that deals damage equal to 4446% of ATK plus 234 to targets in a wide area.
While airborne, tap and hold normal attack to use Descent of Stillness.
Plunges toward the ground, dealing damage equal to 1872% of ATK plus 99 to nearby targets.
When Boundary Zone is used, Void Shredder is replaced with Echo of Infinity. While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 546% of ATK plus 29, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 1274% of ATK plus 67, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 2012% of ATK plus 106, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 2340% of ATK plus 123, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 4597% of ATK plus 242, inflicting 3 stacks of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.

When a Pursuit Prey target is present, use Normal Attack to trigger Pursuit, diving near the target and dealing damage equal to 2974% of ATK plus 157. On hit, grant 1 stack of Frenzy, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered. Pursuit can be triggered up to 1 time every 4.5 seconds.
When Boundary Zone is used, Reckoning of Shadow is replaced with Silent End. While airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 546% of ATK plus 29, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 1274% of ATK plus 67, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 1789% of ATK plus 94, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 2210% of ATK plus 116, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 4243% of ATK plus 223, inflicting 3 stacks of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.

When a Pursuit Prey target is present, use Normal Attack to trigger Pursuit, diving near the target and dealing damage equal to 2974% of ATK plus 157. On hit, grant 1 stack of Frenzy, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered. Pursuit can be triggered up to 1 time every 4.5 seconds.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.

Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Shattering Leap, dashing forward to strike targets and dealing damage equal to 1456% of ATK plus 77, which inflicts 1 stack of Entropic Surge when Dark Star: Chaos is active.

When Boundary Zone is used, Shattering Leap is replaced with Echo of Emptiness. Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to launch missiles, dealing damage equal to 1201% of ATK plus 63 to hit targets, marking locked-on targets with Pursuit Prey, and inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.

Tap skill to leap forward, summoning multiple Star of Oblivion Blades that pierce the ground. The initial strike deals damage equal to 3900%% of ATK plus 205, followed by a dark explosion dealing damage equal to 6084% of ATK plus 320 to targets in the area. Grants Dark Star with effects based on Star of Oblivion's current stat:

Dark Star: Retrograde: With flame/physical stat, Starfall Cleave ignites targets, dealing flame damage equal to 100% of ATK per second for 20 seconds while boosting the Authorizer's flame damage by 23% for 25 seconds. Grants 1 Chaos stack upon hit (up to 1 stack per second). Upon reaching 6 stacks, clears all stacks and launches 6 homing projectiles at random targets, each dealing damage equal to 1,800% of ATK and restoring 2% of Max HP. Multiple hits on locked targets inflict 100% Slow for 1 second, with the effect decaying over 1 second. Cooldown: 25 seconds (this is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects).

Dark Star: Frozen: With frost/volt stat, boosts Star of Oblivion's final damage by 90% for 25 seconds. Restores 10% of Max HP after each Pursuit. When Star of Oblivion is in the off-hand slot, deal frost damage equal to 1,000% of ATK per second to nearby targets. Cooldown: 25 seconds (this is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects).

Dark Star: Chaos: With physical/flame stat, boosts Star of Oblivion's final damage by 40% for 20 seconds. Inflicts an Entropic Surge stack on enemies upon hit. Upon reaching 10 stacks, clears all stacks and triggers an explosion that deals damage equal to 1,500% of ATK to nearby targets. When enemies marked with Entropic Surge die, the Entropic Surge stacks spread to nearby targets. When using Obliteration Blade, remove all Entropic Surge marks within range and trigger an explosion. When Star of Oblivion is in the off-hand slot, deal damage equal to 1,900% of ATK per second and inflicts 1 Entropic Surge stack to nearby targets. Cooldown: 21 seconds (this is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects).

Dark Star: Pulse: With volt/frost stat, boost volt damage by 10% for 20 seconds. Gains 10 Charge stacks. Successful hits consume 1 stack of Charge (up to 1 stack per second) to deal damage equal to 1,800% of ATK to nearby targets. Upon losing all stacks, deal additional damage equal to 6,000% of ATK to nearby targets and restore 25% of Max HP per target hit. Cooldown: 20 seconds (this is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects).

Tap and hold skill to create a Boundary Zone after a brief charge, slowing all enemies within. While the Boundary Zone is active, switching to Star of Oblivion allows using Void Annihilation without charge cost.

Launches missiles dealing damage equal to 2106% of ATK plus 111, marking hit targets as Pursuit Prey while gaining the Dark Star effect matching Starfall Cleave's element. With altered element, Void Pursuit triggers Dark Star: Rebirth:

Dark Star: Rebirth: While the Boundary Zone is active, stores all damage dealt. When the Boundary Zone is terminated by Obliteration Blade or Void Annihilation, unleash 100% of stored damage to all targets in range (capped at ATK × 16,000 in solo mode, ATK × 40,000 in team mode. Only affected by titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects).

After 10 seconds in Boundary Zone or completing the final strike of Echo of Infinity, the skill is replaced with Obliteration Blade. Summon Voidpiercer to dash forward, placing a Singularity in her wake. After a brief charge, pierces through the Singularity, dealing damage equal to 1888% of ATK plus 99 to enemies in her path. The Singularity immobilizes enemies within range, expanding to its maximum range before collapsing in a slashing attack that deals damage equal to 5148% of ATK plus 271, ending the Boundary Zone.

With Star of Oblivion, Wanderers can view the survival status of all world bosses on the map. When equipped with Star of Oblivion, tap on previously defeated world bosses on the map to trigger Divine Arrival, transmitting above the boss to strike. Upon landing, deal damage equal to 1872% of ATK plus 99 to nearby targets. Transmission via Divine Arrival remains available during boss respawn. Can be triggered up to 1 time every minute.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer, transform into Voidpiercer, and unleash a gigantic Black Hole, inflicting a 100% Slowing effect on targets in the area. Compress and unleash the Black Hole from hands, triggering an explosion, dealing damage up to 9927% of ATK plus 522. While the Boundary Zone is active, using Void Annihilation will terminate the Boundary Zone effect. During Void Annihilation, use skills to disengage from discharge with Voidpiercer completing the discharge, gaining damage immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Antoria
weapon_description: This marks the start of the end, and the end of the beginning.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack applies Force Impact on the enemy for 45 seconds, increasing their frost and volt damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). Force Impact replaces the target's grievous status, and targets with Force Impact cannot become grievous. Frost attacks will freeze targets with Force Impact for 2 seconds, and volt attacks will remove the buffs on targets with Force Impact. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

Fusion of Volt and Frost: When this weapon deals damage, the damage calculation uses the highest base Volt/Frost ATK, the highest Volt/Frost ATK percentage, and the highest Volt/Frost damage boost. The weapon is considered both Volt and Frost.

Volt Resonance: Increases Volt ATK by 20% and Volt Resistance by 40%. Activated by equipping 2 or more Volt weapons. This set effect applies in the off-hand slot. (Cannot stack with other Volt Resonance or Volt Reaction effects. Volt Resonance takes priority.)

Frost Resonance: Increases Frost ATK by 20% and Frost Resistance by 40%. Activated by equipping 2 or more Frost weapons. This set effect applies in the off-hand slot. (Cannot stack with other Frost Resonance or Frost Reaction effects. Frost Resonance takes priority.)

Nimbus: Unload: After using Extreme Attack Switch - Thunderclap, deal damage equal to 137% of Volt ATK + 19.5% of the caster’s Max HP + 70% of the sum of all elemental resistances + 264%of Crit to the target every second for 30 seconds. Multiple Unload damages do not stack; Nimbus damage is treated as skill damage. If equip any 1 Flame/Physical weapon, Nimbus damage is boosted to 1.3 times. Additionally, Nimbus damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from Titan equipment's rare stats and won't trigger additional attack effects.
During Alpha Attack mode, the Alpha Energy acquisition interval is reduced to 4 seconds, and the S.A.S Support Strike trigger interval is reduced to 3 seconds.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.

Deals900% of ATK + 47 damage to nearby enemies.

Can be activated by consuming Alpha Energy during Skill - Alpha Attack. While airborne or using the first to fifth normal attacks in air, hold the normal attack button to trigger Special Attack - Rainstorm, consuming 1 Alpha Energy.
Deals 26000% of ATK + 1368 damage to nearby enemies (counts as skill damage).
While airborne, hold the normal attack button, or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetback to trigger General Attack – Lightning Strike.
During the fall, each hit on the target deals 594% of ATK + 31 damage. Upon landing, deal damage equal to 1674% of ATK + 88 damage.

When possessing Alpha Energy upon landing, consumes 1 Alpha Energy to deal 23000% of ATK + 1211 damage (counts as skill damage) and restore 1 Dodge attempt. During Skill - Alpha Attack, the skill's scouting ability is enhanced.
Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (use a directional button before dodging) to trigger a pre-dodge attack, dealing damage up to 1296% of ATK plus 68 to targets ahead.

When possessing Alpha Energy, consumes 1 Alpha Energy to deal 23000% of ATK + 1211 damage (counts as skill damage) and restore 1 Dodge attempt. During Skill - Alpha Attack, the skill's scouting ability is enhanced.

Can be activated during Skill - Alpha Attack. Deals 4196% of ATK +221 damage to nearby enemies.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack inflicts Armor Dissolve on the target for 45 seconds, increasing their flame and physical damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). This effect will replace the grievous status on the target, and targets with this effect cannot become grievous. While in combat, after every 0.5s, the next Swift Cut damage will be increased by an additional 1 time, up to a maximum of 30 times. When multiple Swift Cut damages exist, the highest initial value is used for calculation. Swift Cut damage is counted as discharge skill damage. If there is 1 frost/volt weapon of any kind equipped, Combustion damage is increased to 2.5 times. In addition, Combustion damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

Falls down from mid-air. During the course of landing, each hit on an enemy deals damage equal to 880% of ATK plus 46. Deals damage equal to 1760% of ATK plus 93 to nearby targets after landing.

Deals damage equal to 11968% of ATK plus 630 to nearby targets. Cooldown: 25s (not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects).

name: Hipper
weapon_description: A compact guardian mecha developed by Hope Fleet's armory. Operates autonomously with advanced AI, engaging threats or offering support as needed. Commonly used for VIP protection. Remains cloaked when idle. Issued only to top-tier operatives due to limited production.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack applies Force Impact on the enemy for 45 seconds, increasing their frost and volt damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). Force Impact replaces the target's grievous status, and targets with Force Impact cannot become grievous. Frost attacks will freeze targets with Force Impact for 2 seconds, and volt attacks will remove the buffs on targets with Force Impact. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

Fusion of Volt and Frost: When this weapon deals damage, the damage calculation uses the highest base volt/frost ATK, the highest volt/frost ATK percentage, and the highest volt/frost damage boost. The weapon's type is considered both volt and frost.

Volt Resonance: Increases volt ATK by 20% and volt resistance by 40%. Activated by equipping 2 or more volt weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Volt Resonance or Volt Reaction effects, with Volt Resonance taking precedence.

Frost Resonance: Increases frost ATK by 20% and frost resistance by 40%. Activated by equipping 2 or more frost weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Frost Resonance or Frost Reaction effects, with Frost Resonance taking precedence.

Magfield: On-Field: When landing any hit with AF-010 Servion, it deals damage to nearby targets equal to 2700% of volt ATK plus 46% of the Authorizer's Max HP plus 1620% of the sum of all the Authorizer's resistance types plus 5400% of crit. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time every 1.5 seconds. The On-Field damage counts as normal attack damage. If there is 1 physical/flame weapon of any kind equipped, On-Field damage is multiplied by 2.5. In addition, On-Field damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

Reduces the recharge time for Instant Raid from 9 seconds to 5 second(s). The fifth normal attack places an electrify stack on enemies hit, which can be triggered by Swish Combo to deal 10,000% bonus damage.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
Increases volt damage by 24%. Each volt damage hit grants a stack of 10% damage reduction, up to 20%, lasting 5 second(s).
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

Ignores 30% of the target's Volt Resistance (each element's total resistance ignored cannot exceed 50%). Upon switching to another weapon, restores Max HP based on 2% × the number of seconds AF-010 Servion was active. Maximum HP Restored: 40%.
Increases final damage by 45%. Increases Swish Combo's total damage to 41,760%.
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch five consecutive strikes.
First strike: Deals 504% of ATK + 27 damage.
Second strike: Deals up to 1109% of ATK + 58 damage.
Third strike: Deals up to 3168% of ATK + 167 damage.
Fourth strike: Deals up to 3053% of ATK +161 damage, launching the target.
Fifth strike: Deals up to 2772% of ATK +146 damage, launching the target.
While airborne, use a normal attack to unleash five consecutive strikes, consuming Endurance.
First strike: Deals up to 504% of ATK + 27 damage.
Second strike: Deals up to 1109% of ATK + 58 damage.
Third strike: Deals up to 3168% of ATK + 167 damage.
Fourth strike: Deals up to 3053% of ATK + 161 damage, knocking the target back.
Fifth strike: Deals up to 2772% of ATK + 146 damage, knocking the target back.

First strike: Deals 1512% of ATK + 80 damage, knocking the target back a short distance.
Second strike: Deals up to 3326% of ATK + 175 damage, knocking the target back a short distance.
Third strike: Deals up to 7200% of ATK + 379 damage, knocking the target back a short distance.
Fourth strike: Deals up to 7661% of ATK +403 damage, launching the target.
Fifth strike: Deals up to 8712% of ATK +459 damage, launching the target.
While airborne and under Joint Combat, use a normal attack to launch five consecutive strikes, consuming Endurance.
First strike: Deals up to 1512% of ATK + 80 damage, knocking the target back a short distance.
Second strike: Deals up to 3326% of ATK + 175 damage, knocking the target back a short distance.
