Hold Normal Attack during the first to third hits to trigger Stride Lance while on the ground. Dashes to the front of the target, dealing 7661% of ATK plus 403 damage.
Hold Normal Attack while airborne, or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using Jetback to trigger Starfall Moon.
During the fall, each hit on the target deals 432% of ATK + 23 damage. Deals damage equal to 1728% of ATK + 91 damage to nearby targets upon landing.
Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (use a directional button before dodging) to trigger Bold Thrust, dealing up to 2477% of ATK plus 130 damage to enemies in front.
Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Blink Strike, dealing up to 2477% of ATK plus 130 damage to enemies in front.

When Instant Raid effect is active, using a normal attack during dodge attack triggers a Spiral Waltz, dealing up to 9331% of ATK plus 491 damage to enemies in front (counts as basic attack damage). And using a normal attack while casting Spiral Waltz triggers the fifth enhanced normal attack effect.

Grants temporary Invincibility and deals damage equal to 10022% of ATK + 527 to nearby enemies, then enters Joint Combat for 22s (Cooldown: 21s). Joint Combat: Grants Hyperbody for 22s. Upgrades normal attacks to March Sync when AF-010 Servion is in the main slot, summoning a Mecha to assist in combat and providing bonus damage instances. Grants Instant Raid 9s after entering Joint Combat, enabling the dodge attack skill Spiral Waltz and unlocking Swish Combo. Switching AF-010 Servion to the off-hand slot removes both Joint Combat and Instant Raid.
Can be activated during Instant Raid. Deals damage up to 20160% of ATK plus 1061 damage to nearby targets. Removes Instant Raid and Joint Combat effects when the skill ends.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, switching to this weapon removes all debuffs from the Authorizer and deals damage equal to 24480% of ATK plus 1288 to targets in front. Also grants immunity for 2.6 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

name: Lechesis
weapon_description: A giant scythe glowing with soft light. It seeks not to cut hope itself, but to sever the bond between life and death.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack inflicts Armor Dissolve on the target for 45 seconds, increasing their flame and physical damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). This effect will replace the grievous status on the target, and targets with this effect cannot become grievous. Physical attacks will stun targets under the dissolve effect for 2 seconds, and flame attacks will decrease the targets' speed by 50% for 5 seconds. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

Fusion of Flame and Mass: When the weapon deals damage, damage is calculated using the highest equipped Physical/Flame base ATK, the highest equipped Physical/Flame ATK percentage, and the highest equipped Physical/Flame damage boost, and the weapon is considered both a Physical and Flame weapon.

Flame Resonance: Increases Flame ATK by 20% and Flame Resistance by 40%. Activated by equipping 2 or more Flame weapons. Active in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Flame Resonance or Flame Reaction effects, with Flame Resonance taking precedence.

Physical Resonance: Increases Physical ATK by 20% and Physical Resistance by 40%. Activated by equipping 2 or more Physical weapons. Active in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Physical Resonance or Physical Reaction effects, with Physical Resonance taking precedence.

Eternal Salvation: On-Field: When landing any hit with Eternal Salvation, deals damage equal to 2700% of Flame ATK + 46% × Max HP + 1620% × Sum of all Element Resistances + 5400% × Crit to nearby targets. This effect can be triggered at most once every 1.5s. Eternal Salvation damage counts as normal attack damage. If equipped with any Frost/Volt Weapon, Eternal Salvation damage is multiplied by 2.5. Only affected by Titan equipment's rare stats.
Deals Flame Damage equal to 50% of ATK every 0.5s when equipped with Eternal Salvation. Active in the off-hand slot until leaving combat.
Triggers when Eternal Salvation is equipped, causing Little Spring to release a light wave every 5s, restoring HP equal to 100% of ATK to teammates within range. Lasts until leaving combat.

Increases Final Damage by 15%. Little Spring's light waves deal Flame Damage equal to 60% of current Elemental Attack to enemies. Eternal Salvation restores 2% HP to the caster with each Normal or Dodge Attack.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
Unlocks Prism Tide under Sever! Heart Lock. Special Attack has 2 uses. Converts Little Spring's overhealing into Shield, up to 30% of Max HP.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

Increases Final Damage by 15%. Reduces the cooldown of Little Spring's light waves to 3s. While Benediction Resonance is active, targets hit by Little Spring's light waves gain Moral Booster, receiving 25% All Element Damage boost for 5s (Unstackable).
Increases Flame DMG by 45%. When Benediction Resonance is active, Duskwave Slash, Love Rhapsody, Prism Tide, and Radiant Shock execute enemies with less than 16% HP.
Press Normal Attack on the ground to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deals damage up to 840% of ATK + 44 to the target and knocks them back.
Second Attack: Deals damage up to 1664% of ATK + 88 to the target and knocks them back.
Third Attack: Deals damage up to 2380% of ATK + 125 to the target and knocks them back.
Fourth Attack: Deals damage up to 3643% of ATK + 192 to the target and knocks them back.
Fifth Attack: Deals damage up to 10528% of ATK + 554 to the target and knocks them back.

Fourth Attack: Deals damage up to 3312% of ATK + 174 to the target and knocks them back.
Fifth Attack: Deals damage up to 9776% of ATK + 515 to the target and knocks them back.
Hold Normal Attack during the first and second hits while on the ground to trigger Wraith Dash.
Performs a rapid spinning slash forward, finishing with a downward diagonal strike, dealing damage equal to 5654% of ATK + 298 to nearby targets.
Hold Normal Attack during the third and fourth hits while on the ground to trigger Glint Assault.
Dashes forward and slashes after charging, dealing damage equal to 6390% of ATK + 336 to nearby targets.
Hold Normal Attack while airborne (press when a target is available), or use Normal Attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetpack to trigger Neon Crash.
Plunges from the above, dealing damage equal to 240% of ATK + 13 to hit enemies during the plunge. Upon landing, deals damage equal to 3418% of ATK + 180 to nearby targets.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.
Press Normal Attack during the short perfect dodge window (use a directional button before dodging) to trigger True Strike, dealing damage up to 1389% of ATK + 73 to targets ahead.
Press Normal Attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Critical Flash, dealing damage equal to 1859%of ATK + 98 to targets hit.

Launches enemies upward and slashes forward rapidly, dealing damage equal to 15043% of ATK + 792 to nearby targets and inflicting Armor Dissolve. Grants Sever! Heart Lock as well as Hyperbody for 25s. Cooldown: 25s (this is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects).

Sever! Heart Lock: Hold to trigger Love Rhapsody while in Wraith Dash. After casting Love Rhapsody, hold again under Wraith Dash to trigger Prism Tide. After casting Prism Tide, hold once more under Wraith Dash to trigger Radiant Shock (Sever! Heart Lock is removed when switching weapons). These special attacks can be used a total of 3 times and last for 25s.
Love Rhapsody: Strikes forward and upward after charging, dealing damage equal to 5,200% of ATK to nearby targets.
Prism Tide: Strikes powerfully forward and upward after charging, dealing damage equal to 27,000% of ATK to nearby targets.
Radiant Shock: Strikes powerfully forward and upward after charging, dealing damage equal to 40,000% of ATK to nearby targets.

When the weapon is fully charged or Phantasia is triggered, removes all debuffs from the character upon switching to this weapon. Launches a heart-shaped energy wave forward, then slashes the charged wave upon full charge. The wave explodes, dealing damage equal to 16814% of ATK + 885 to nearby targets. Grants immunity to damage for 2.6s (unavailable in Apex League).

First strike: Deals up to 720% of ATK + 38 damage, knocking targets back.
Second strike: Deals up to 1785% of ATK + 94 damage, knocking targets back.
Chain into Falling Attack after the second strike, then directly into the fourth instance of the normal attack.

Hold Normal Attack on the ground after launching any instance of a normal attack with 2 Encore points to trigger Radiant Resonance.
Helene and Pollux's coordinated attacks deal up to 80000% of ATK + 4211 damage, knocking targets back.
Hold normal attack while airborne (press when a target is available), or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetpack to trigger Sky Bound - Descent.
Plunges from the above, dealing damage equal to 60% of ATK plus 3 to hit enemies during the plunge. Upon landing, deals damage equal to 1200% of ATK plus 63 to nearby enemies.

Hold Dodge to summon a Pollux Trampoline in front. Up to 3 trampolines can be active at once.

Grants Damage Immunity for 2.6s while the skill is active (not applicable in Apex League).

name: Nanto
weapon_description: High-performance gauntlets developed under the leadership of Levin, former Safety Supervisor of Anchor Infinity — the secret weapon of his special ops team. Ironically, its very first target was its own creator: Levin, having been judged a traitor, was executed by Nanto using Frostfang in the Silent Garden operation. Frost is silent; unlike rain or snow, it arrives without fanfare but transforms the world overnight.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack inflicts Armor Dissolve on the target for 45 seconds, increasing their flame and physical damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). If the Authorizer has N-Aura Surge, using Eclipse Break consumes 1 Surge and triggers N-Aura Echo, dealing 10,000% bonus damage. This damage counts as normal attack damage.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
Increases Final Damage by 20%. Restores 5% of Max HP for every 20 N-Aura consumed. Grants 10% Damage Reduction for 30s upon taking damage, up to 30%.
Increases Physical Damage by 50%, and N-Aura Echo's damage to 23,000%.

Press Skill to cancel the attack wind-down and unlock the 1st hit of Eclipse Tempest if N-Aura Break is active while the caster uses Dipper Sight;
Consumes 20 N-Aura, dealing bonus damage equal to 7000% of ATK + 368 if the caster has N-Aura while using Dipper Sight.

Deals damage equal to 150% of ATK + 8 on each hit while falling. Deals damage equal to 600% of ATK + 32 to nearby targets upon landing.

The caster also gains 60 N-Aura and enters N-Aura Break for 18s, gaining Hyperbody and unlocking Eclipse Break and Eclipse Tempest. Eclipse Dragon Cooldown: 21s. Switching Frostfang to the off-hand slot immediately removes N-Aura Break. The caster will lose all N-Aura, and Eclipse Break and Eclipse Tempest will be locked when N-Aura Break is removed.

Press Skill to use Eclipse Break when N-Aura Break is active but the conditions for Eclipse Tempest aren't met, dealing damage equal to 3000% of ATK + 158.
Press Normal Attack while using Eclipse Break to cancel the attack wind-down and unlock Dipper Spin.

Consumes 20 N-Aura to deal bonus damage equal to 7000% of ATK + 368 to nearby targets if the caster has N-Aura during the 1st and 2nd strikes of Eclipse Tempest.
Hold Skill during the 2nd strike of Eclipse Tempest to cancel the attack wind-down and unlock Eclipse Break.

name: Salidy
weapon_description: What I can't get — just cut it apart.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack inflicts Armor Dissolve on the target for 45 seconds, increasing their flame and physical damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). This effect will replace the grievous status on the target, and targets with this effect cannot become grievous. Physical attacks will stun targets under the dissolve effect for 2 seconds, and flame attacks will decrease the targets' speed by 50% for 5 seconds. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

Fusion of Flame and Mass: The weapon is considered both Flame and Physical. Its damage calculation is influenced by base Flame & Physical ATK, Flame & Physical ATK percentage, and Flame & Physical damage boost, with the higher value taking precedence.

Flame Resonance: Increases Flame ATK by 20% and Flame Resistance by 40%. Activated by equipping 2 or more Flame Weapons. Active in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Flame Resonance or Flame Reaction effects, with Flame Resonance taking precedence.

Physical Resonance: Increases Physical ATK by 20% and Physical Resistance by 40%. Activated by equipping 2 or more Physical Weapons. Active in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Physical Resonance or Physical Reaction effects, with Physical Resonance taking precedence.

The higher the altitude when triggering the attack, the greater the damage dealt, up to 600% damage.
Approach the enemy from behind while crouching, then use normal attack to trigger Sneak Attack and stab with the dagger, dealing damage equal to 900% of ATK.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, which reduces the speed of targets within the area. Cooldown: 25 seconds. Become immune to hitstun while dodging for 0.5 seconds.
Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Leap Attack.

The Wanderer swings their blade forward and deals damage equal to 94% of ATK to the target, strongly suspending them while going airborne. Then, deal additional damage equal to 141% of ATK to the target.

Swings the blade while roaming through targets, dealing total damage equal to 925.8% of ATK to up to 5 targets (damage dealt by each consecutive hit on the same target will be reduced by 20% from the previous hit). After Roam has concluded, slash the space in front, dealing AoE damage equal to 277.7% of ATK and suspending targets hit. Grants immunity to control effects while skill is in use, and reduces all damage taken by 50%. Cooldown: 20s.

Grants 1 stack of Power Surge upon damaging enemies with skills, lasting for 60s and up to 14 stacks. Grants Vital Drive at full stacks, increasing Normal Attack damage using sword by 70% for 2s, and the damage of Jumping Strike, Cyclone, and Diving Edge by 70% for 4s.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer, then rush to the target and strongly suspend them, dealing 559.4% of ATK, leaving behind a Bladestorm that deals 372.9% of ATK, while gaining immunity to grievous/freeze/burn/electrify effects for 5 seconds. Meanwhile, gain hyperbody and a shield equal to 5% of Max HP for 3.5 seconds.

name: Umi
weapon_description: The whip favored by the new Executor, Umi. Umi's favorite part of it is that she doesn't get tripped up by it, usually.
skill_description: A powerful Skill Damage weapon. Skills have long wind-up but deal high damage over time. Recommended for weapons with Skill damage boosts.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will cause enemies to become grievous for 7 seconds, reducing their healing effect by 30% and dealing damage equal to 100% of ATK.
Umi: Final DMG: Increases Final Damage by 29.0%.

Increases Combat Strength by 50.

Increases Combat Strength by 50.
After using a skill, increase damage by 10.4% for 13 seconds. Cooldown: 30 seconds. Can be stacked with weapons' damage-boosting effects. This effect is lost upon switching weapons.
Increases Combat Strength by 50.
When switching to Mobius, immediately gain 40 warmup points. Cooldown: 25 seconds.
Increases Combat Strength by 50.
Upon entering Magic Trick, deal area damage equal to 600% of ATK to nearby targets.
After using a skill, increase damage by 18% for 13 seconds. Cooldown: 30 seconds. Can be stacked with weapons' damage-boosting effects. This effect is lost upon switching weapons.
Increases Combat Strength by 50.

Gain 4 stacks of a buff 3 seconds after using a skill, each stack increases skill damage by 5.8%. Every 3 seconds thereafter, lose 1 stack of the buff and deal additional damage equal to 186% of ATK to surrounding enemies 1 time. When no stacks are left, this effect ends and no additional damage will be dealt. This effect is lost upon switching weapons. This additional damage is not affected by the damage boost effects of weapons.
Increases Combat Strength by 100.

Gain 4 stacks of a buff 3 seconds after using a skill, each stack increases skill damage by 10%. When no stacks are left, this effect ends and no additional damage will be dealt. This effect is lost upon switching weapons. This additional damage is not affected by the damage boost effects of weapons.

Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 82.8% of ATK.

Deal damage equal to 152.6% of ATK to smaller locked-on targets and draw in surrounding targets. Deal damage equal to 124.2% of ATK to larger locked-on targets and draw in surrounding targets.

Plummet from the skies, dealing damage equal to 176.5% of ATK and launching the target.

Accumulating 100 Warmup Points in Magic Gauge unlocks a skill that gathers enemies in a designated area, deals damage equal to 720% of ATK to them, and activates Magic Trick while consuming Warmup Points, lasting for 13s. Cooldown: 30s (This is not affected by any cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects other than Mobius itself). The Skill button becomes Switch in the meanwhile.

Grants a Spade or Heart Playing Card every 1.5s during Magic Trick. Press the Switch button to select the type of Playing Card you're about to get. Getting 2 Playing Cards automatically casts the corresponding Card Trick. Cooldown: 2.9s.
Does not charge Magic Gauge and increases the Final Damage of Mobius's Normal Attack and Dodge Attack by 20% during Magic Trick.
Playing Card Combos can trigger corresponding Card Tricks. Card Trick damage counts as skill damage.
Heart + Spade → Psychic Puppet
Heart + Heart → Contradiction Corrosion
Spade + Spade → Card Sweep
Magic Trick ends when switching to other weapons or defeated.

Pull out a colony of bats from your hat to guard the Wanderer. During Magic Trick, only 50% of the damage taken will be tallied. The remaining 50% will slowly be deducted from your HP 20 seconds after Magic Trick ends. The delayed tally effect only applies when Fortitude Resonance is not active.
Casts Corrosive Flower on 1 target within certain distance, dealing damage equal to 824.3% of ATK.
Summon a large number of flying cards, forming a hurricane that swarms to the target location, attacking the target up to 12 times and dealing total damage equal to 686.9% of ATK.

Meanwhile, gain hyperbody and a shield equal to 5% of Max HP for 3.5 seconds.

skill_description: Skills and Discharge Skills provide both survivability and healing. Omnium Missile can also interrupts enemies from healing. Grants Damage Boost Support upon advancement.

Meanwhile, gain hyperbody and a shield equal to 5% of Max HP for 3.5 seconds.

skill_description: Skills provide lots of Resistance boosts and Discharge Skills provide Shield effects. Restores HP when shattering enemies after advancement. Especially effective against Frost-type enemies.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will strongly freeze targets for 1 second and leave them frostbitten for 6 seconds. Breaking the ice shell deals damage equal to 100% of ATK. While frostbitten, the target's speed is reduced by 30%.

Deal damage equal to 371.4% of ATK in total and launch targets.

Swipe upward, dealing damage equal to 47.7% of ATK and suspending the target.

Notes can only be placed at a 0.5-second interval.

Attack with claws, dealing damage equal to 164.6% of ATK to surrounding targets and knocking them down.

After the consciousness returns to the target's main body, deal area damage equal to 240% of ATK.
The consciousness returns to its main body when it's defeated, when its duration runs out, when a new consciousness is summoned, or when it strays too far from the main body.

name: Cobalt-B
weapon_description: Invented by a mad scientist. With its impressive test numbers, one can only imagine how powerful it might be at full power.
skill_description: A powerful Skill Damage weapon. Further increases Skill Damage and Cooldown Reduction upon advancement, unlocking powerful burst abilities. Combine Charged Shot with other moves to deal a high amount of damage. Recommended for weapons with Skill damage boosts.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will ignite the target for 8 seconds, dealing damage equal to 20% of ATK every second.
Cobalt-B: Final DMG: Increases Final Damage by 18%.
Increases Combat Strength by 50.
Increases Combat Strength by 50.
Each round of barrage deals additional damage equal to 2% of the target's current HP (cannot exceed 85% of ATK), which counts as skill damage.

Third Attack: Deal total damage equal to 169.6% of ATK.
Fourth Attack: Deal total damage equal to 254.4% of ATK.
Fifth Attack: Deal total damage equal to 212% of ATK.

Tap and hold normal attack to charge an attack and release to fire rounds, dealing damage equal to 49.5% of ATK, plus an explosion 18 seconds later (or if the target is defeated), dealing damage equal to 49.5% of ATK to nearby enemies. Every 5 times the target takes damage from Cobalt-B, the damaging range is doubled (up to 3 times) and the damage dealt is increased.
While airborne or after jumping once, launch Jumping Blast.
Toss a bomb forward that deals damage equal to 218.8% of ATK to enemies in a circle ahead, knocking them back a short distance. Consume 250 endurance.
After double-jumping, launch Aerial Discharge in mid-air.
Fire an Omnium beam downward. The beam then sweeps forward, dealing damage equal to 262.3% of ATK to enemies affected.
Tap and hold normal attack during a normal attack to unleash Suppressing Fire in front, dealing area damage equal to 195.2% of ATK to enemies affected in total.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, which reduces the speed of targets in the area. Cooldown: 25 seconds. Become immune to hitstun while dodging for 0.5 seconds.

Deal damage equal to 183.5% of ATK to targets in a frontal cone area.
Continuously shoot targets in a frontal cone area, dealing total damage equal to 1431.9% of ATK. Cooldown: 25 seconds.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and throw 3 grenades forward, dealing AoE damage equal to 1146.7% of ATK in total and launching the target. Meanwhile, gain hyperbody and a shield equal to 5% of Max HP for 3.5 seconds.

name: Nemesis
weapon_description: Its designer is unknown. The special hovering EM Blaster's prototype's blueprint has been lost. It contains a unique electrical saving process in its interior. It's extremely troublesome to repair when it gets worn out, but Cobalt-B of Banges Tech seems to be able to do it.
skill_description: Dodge and Skills provide decent healing. Discharge Skills summon Electrodes that provide damage output in the off-hand slot. Significantly increases Electrode's off-hand damage and healing upon advancement.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will strongly paralyze targets for 1 second, leave them electrified for 5 seconds, and deal damage equal to 100% of ATK. While paralyzed and/or electrified, the target can't receive any buffs.

Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger a slowing magnetic field.

Venus fires an electrified ball that explodes after traveling forward a set distance or coming in contact with targets. Deal damage equal to 89% of ATK, and generate a slowing magnetic field for 2 seconds, reducing the movement speed and attack speed of all enemies caught within by 35%.

Dodging will trigger a Healing Chain that heals nearby allies by 72% of the Wanderer's ATK. For the next 10 seconds, a smaller Healing Chain will trigger every 2 seconds that heals nearby allies by 20% of the Wanderer's ATK.
Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (use a directional button before dodging) to trigger Parallel Beams.
Venus fires a pair of parallel energy beams, dealing piercing damage equal to 170.8% of ATK.

Dodging will trigger a Healing Chain that heals nearby allies by 72% of the Wanderer's ATK; for the next 10 seconds, a small Healing Chain will trigger every 2 seconds, which heals nearby allies by 20% of the Wanderer's ATK.

Venus fires a guided missile that explodes on contact with enemy targets, dealing damage equal to 555.9% of ATK and knocking down targets. At the same time, heal nearby allies by 144% of the Wanderer's ATK per second for 6 seconds. Cooldown: 25 seconds.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and command Venus to fire a cross-shaped ray at the ground, creating an unstable area and slowing targets' movement speed by 70% for 5 seconds. After a brief delay, unleash an electromagnetic burst that deals damage equal to 792.4% of ATK. Meanwhile, gain hyperbody and a shield equal to 5% of Max HP for 3.5 seconds.
Using a discharge attack will spawn 1 Electrode at the target's position that attacks every 1.5 seconds, dealing damage equal to 45% of ATK.
The Electrode gains 100% of the Wanderer's stats, can be attacked or healed, and loses 3% of its Max HP every second.
Only 1 Electrode can exist at any given time, and summoning a new Electrode will replace the previous one. The charging effect does not apply when Electrode deals damage.

name: KING
weapon_description: A powerful scythe, great for both offense and defense. Able to instantly kill its target within a certain distance.
skill_description: Excels in DPS and Shatter abilities, especially effective against groups of enemies.

skill_description: Charges fast. Skills and Normal Attacks have 2 Branches: Excited Flow provides DPS and Lifesteal, while Silent Flow focuses on survivability and gathering enemies. Discharge Skills also provide significant Resistance boosts. Grants effects including Resistance Boosts, Manual Trigger Phantasia, and Enemy ATK Reduction upon advancement.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will strongly freeze targets for 1 second and leave them frostbitten for 6 seconds. Breaking the ice shell deals damage equal to 100% of ATK. While frostbitten, the target's speed is reduced by 30%.

Enter Silent Flow when Fortitude Resonance is activated. Excited Flow: Flashing Stream is replaced by Silent Flow: Concentrated Stream. Enter Excited Flow when Fortitude Resonance is not activated.

The Wanderer can gain Sword Shadow that follows them around when using Saki Fuwa's skills. Sword Shadow will release Surge when the Wanderer uses Saki Fuwa's branch skills or discharge skills, dealing area damage equal to 120% of frost ATK. Cooldown of Surge: 12 seconds.

While in Excited Flow: Sword Shadow will release Flow when the Wanderer deals damage with any weapon, which deals damage equal to 30% of frost ATK on the first target hit and recovers HP equal to 240% of the damage. Each hit's maximum lifesteal cannot exceed: ATK × skill multiplier × 1.25 × lifesteal rate. Cooldown: 3 seconds.

While in Silent Flow: After Sword Shadow releases Surge, the Wanderer gains 3 blocks for 10 seconds. The maximum block capacity cannot exceed 3.3% of Max HP. Each successful block deals Counterattack damage equal to 32% of frost ATK to the target.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and dash toward the target with a combo attack, dealing total damage equal to 893.7% of ATK. Meanwhile, gain hyperbody and a shield equal to 5% of Max HP for 3.5 seconds.

Spark fires out Sparks forward that last for 12 seconds, bouncing between the target and the Wanderer. The damage increases with the distance traveled, up to 306.3% of ATK. Targets hit receive an Emblazen mark for 4 seconds, which cannot be reapplied to the same target within 12 seconds. At the same time, Spark fires 4 bullets, each dealing damage equal to 99.9% of ATK. Spark's normal attacks deal 20% more damage to targets marked with Emblazen. If the target is under burn effect inflicted by Spark, being hit by Sparks will trigger the burn effect 1 time and ignite, causing additional damage equal to 80% of the total remaining damage (only accounting for the burn effects applied by Spark). Tally cooldown: 5 seconds. Skill cooldown: 40 seconds.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer. Spark enters a charged state, continuously blasting wide-area searing energy beams forward, ending with an explosion, dealing damage equal to 1586% of ATK. The beams inflict burn to all targets hit upon explosion, dealing damage equal to 10% of ATK per second for 25 seconds. The burning effect is counted as discharge damage. Meanwhile, gain hyperbody and a shield equal to 5% of Max HP for 3.5 seconds.

Recommended for weapons with Dodge Attack damage boosts. Effective against enemies with high Resistances.

description.paragraph: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will strongly freeze targets for 1 second and leave them frostbitten for 6 seconds. Breaking the ice shell deals damage equal to 100% of ATK. While frostbitten, the target's speed is reduced by 30%.

Leaps toward the target, dealing damage equal to 880.6% of ATK and strongly suspending the target. Grants nearby allies a shield equal to 1600% of the caster's ATK for 10s. Cooldown: 30s.

Pummel the ground and strongly launch targets in front, dealing damage equal to 60% of ATK and summoning up to 3 Blades that last for 75 seconds (up to 1 Blade every 3 meters). Interacting with a Blade heals targets within the movement radius, restoring HP equal to (41.6% + 12.48% × movement distance/meter) of the target's ATK. When 3 Blades exist, a Nebula appears. Interacting with a Blade deals damage to targets within the movement radius equal to (15% + 5.25% × movement distance/meter) of ATK.

When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, switching to this weapon from another removes all debuffs from the wielder and unleashes Chanting Sigh, dealing damage equal to 779% of ATK, placing delay on the enemy for a short time, and granting healing over time for all allies nearby: Recover HP by 200% of Lyra's ATK per second for 5 seconds, and receive hyperbody and a shield equal to 5% of Max HP for 3.5 seconds.

Enhanced Diving Protocol will additionally summon Poppa is Here to perform 1 dodge attack, and you can store up to a maximum of 3 activations of Enhanced Diving Protocol.
Increases Combat Strength by 50.

Grants a stack of 0.4% damage boost upon losing HP (Cooldown: 0.3s). Lasts for 45s, up to 15 stacks. Switching weapons does not remove the damage boost, but it is only active when the weapon with this Matrix is in the main slot. Multiplies with weapon damage boosts.

During combat, if the Wanderer is not in the Poppa is Here state, Poppa will appear every 8 seconds to launch a Heavy Energy Round I, dealing damage equal to 44% of ATK to nearby targets.
When in the overworld, on the ground, and in the non-combat state, hold dodge to place fireworks of a random style that explode after a short delay.

Each Explosive Shot hit costs 0.5% of the caster's current HP (increases with the height difference). The cost doubles in PvP and team modes.

[Firepower Supply] Drops a random combat supply near the caster after Poppa is Here ends. It exists for 20s and grants certain effects once picked up (only effective while using EP-7000 Skyfire). Possible supplies:

After triggering Feedback, every Crystamax thorn will deal damage to nearby targets equal to 50% of ATK every 2 seconds for 50 seconds. Each target can only receive damage from 1 Crystamax thorn at a time.

First Attack: Deal damage equal to 80.7% of ATK.

Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 118.3% of ATK.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 212.7% of ATK.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 102.9% of ATK.
While using normal attack on the ground, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Advance, dealing damage equal to 142% of ATK to the target.

Dive through the air, consuming endurance and dealing damage equal to 111.6% of ATK to the target upon reaching the ground.

Landing a hit 17 times with normal attack accumulates 1 Feedback (up to a maximum of 2 accumulations). Each time Lost Art is used to perform any dodge attack, consume 1 Feedback, recovering 35% of Max HP and resetting the position for all Crystamax thorns on the field.
At the same time, for each Crystamax thorn summoned by the Wanderer nearby, increase the Wanderer's damage by 2.5%.
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.

Using Pillage can trigger Feedback.

Using Swarm can trigger Feedback.

The hive consciousness can be resisted by non-Grayspace Entity targets, which are not affected by this control effect.

Dash rapidly between two points 10 times, drawing in nearby targets and dealing damage up to 782.9% of ATK to nearby targets. Upon landing, deal damage equal to 335.5% of ATK to nearby targets. Cooldown: 30 seconds.

Meanwhile, gain hyperbody and a shield equal to 5% of Max HP for 3.5 seconds.

After successfully casting Harrah's Embrace, 3 Crystamax thorns are generated (up to 5 thorns can be present at a time). The thorns start with 100% of Max HP, lose 2.6% of their HP per second, and are only affected by the Feedback healing effect. This effect lasts for 60 seconds. For each Crystamax thorn summoned by the wielder in the vicinity, the wielder's damage is increased by 2.5%.

Dark Star: Rebirth: Deals additional damage equal to 150% of ATK (counts as Normal Attack damage) with the previous extra attack used inside the Boundary Zone. While the Boundary Zone exists, all damage dealt by the caster is accumulated. Deals 100% of the accumulated damage to all targets within the range when the Boundary Zone is broken by Obliteration Blade or a Discharge Skill, up to 500% of ATK.

Hold the skill to briefly charge, then deploy the Boundary Zone. Enemies inside the zone are slowed. Switching back to Star of Oblivion during its duration consumes no energy to release Shattered Realm, which fires missiles dealing damage equal to 1257.3% of ATK. Hitting locked-on targets marks them as Pursuit Prey, changes attacks to Blade-type, and replaces Dodge Attack with Echo of Emptiness. After 10s, the skill transforms into Obliteration Blade (finishing the last hit of Echo of Infinity immediately replaces the skill with Obliteration Blade) and grants Dark Star: Rebirth.

Dark Star: Rebirth: Deals additional damage equal to 150% of ATK (counts as Normal Attack damage) with the previous extra attack used inside the Boundary Zone. While the Boundary Zone exists, all damage dealt by the caster is accumulated. Deals 100% of the accumulated damage to all targets within the range when the Boundary Zone is broken by Obliteration Blade or a Discharge Skill, up to 500% of ATK.

name: Brevey

During this time, Pollux can be moved within a small range; pressing the skill repeatedly makes Pollux perform two consecutive cycllic attacks.
Jumping or Dodging exits this state.
Summons Pollux, dealing damage up to 435% of ATK to the target and knocks them back.
First strike: Deals damage up to 120% of ATK to the target and knocks them back.
Second strike: Deals damage up to 350% of ATK to the target and knocks them back.

When the weapon is fully charged or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon from another, removes all debuffs from the player. Helene summons the Puppet Theater. As the curtain rises, Pollux appears and attacks forward, dealing damage equal to 1758.5% of ATK to nearby enemies. Grants Hyperbody and a shield equal to 5% of Max HP for 3.5s.
